1014: void LcdDisplay::SetEmotion(const char *emotion)
1015: {
1016:     // Stop any running GIF animation
1017:     if (gif_controller_)
1018:     {
1019:         DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1020:         gif_controller_->Stop();
1021:         gif_controller_.reset();
1022:     }
1023: 
1024:     if (emoji_image_ == nullptr)
1025:     {
1026:         return;
1027:     }
1028: 
1029:     auto emoji_collection = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_)->emoji_collection();
1030:     auto image = emoji_collection != nullptr ? emoji_collection->GetEmojiImage(emotion) : nullptr;
1031:     if (image == nullptr)
1032:     {
1033:         const char *utf8 = font_awesome_get_utf8(emotion);
1034:         if (utf8 != nullptr && emoji_label_ != nullptr)
1035:         {
1036:             DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1037:             lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, utf8);
1038:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1039:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1040:         }
1041:         return;
1042:     }
1043: 
1044:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1045:     if (image->IsGif())
1046:     {
1047:         // Create new GIF controller
1048:         gif_controller_ = std::make_unique<LvglGif>(image->image_dsc());
1049: 
1050:         if (gif_controller_->IsLoaded())
1051:         {
1052:             // Set up frame update callback
1053:             gif_controller_->SetFrameCallback([this]()
1054:                                               { lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc()); });
1055: 
1056:             // Set initial frame and start animation
1057:             lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc());
1058:             gif_controller_->Start();
1059: 
1060:             // Show GIF, hide others
1061:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1062:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1063:         }
1064:         else
1065:         {
1066:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to load GIF for emotion: %s", emotion);
1067:             gif_controller_.reset();
1068:         }
1069:     }
1070:     else
1071:     {
1072:         lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, image->image_dsc());
1073:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1074:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1075:     }
1076: 
1077: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1078:     // In WeChat message style, if emotion is neutral, don't display it
1079:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1080:     if (strcmp(emotion, "neutral") == 0 && child_count > 0)
1081:     {
1082:         // Stop GIF animation if running
1083:         if (gif_controller_)
1084:         {
1085:             gif_controller_->Stop();
1086:             gif_controller_.reset();
1087:         }
1088: 
1089:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1090:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1091:     }
1092: #endif
1093: }

1095: void LcdDisplay::SetTheme(Theme *theme)
1096: {
1097:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1098: 
1099:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(theme);
1100: 
1101:     // Get the active screen
1102:     lv_obj_t *screen = lv_screen_active();
1103: 
1104:     // Set font
1105:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
1106:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
1107:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
1108: 
1109:     if (text_font->line_height >= 40)
1110:     {
1111:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1112:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1113:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1114:     }
1115:     else
1116:     {
1117:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
1118:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
1119:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
1120:     }
1121: 
1122:     // Set parent text color
1123:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
1124:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1125: 
1126:     // Set background image
1127:     if (lvgl_theme->background_image() != nullptr)
1128:     {
1129:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, lvgl_theme->background_image()->image_dsc(), 0);
1130:     }
1131:     else
1132:     {
1133:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, nullptr, 0);
1134:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1135:     }
1136: 
1137:     // Update top bar background color with 50% opacity
1138:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
1139:     {
1140:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1141:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1142:     }
1143: 
1144:     // Update status bar elements
1145:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1146:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1147:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1148:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1149:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1150:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1151: 
1152:     // If we have the chat message style, update all message bubbles
1153: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1154:     // Set content background opacity
1155:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(content_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
1156: 
1157:     // Iterate through all children of content (message containers or bubbles)
1158:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1159:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < child_count; i++)
1160:     {
1161:         lv_obj_t *obj = lv_obj_get_child(content_, i);
1162:         if (obj == nullptr)
1163:             continue;
1164: 
1165:         lv_obj_t *bubble = nullptr;
1166: 
1167:         // Check if this object is a container or bubble
1168:         // If it's a container (user or system message), get its child as bubble
1169:         // If it's a bubble (assistant message), use it directly
1170:         if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(obj) > 0)
1171:         {
1172:             // Might be a container, check if it's a user or system message container
1173:             // User and system message containers are transparent
1174:             lv_opa_t bg_opa = lv_obj_get_style_bg_opa(obj, 0);
1175:             if (bg_opa == LV_OPA_TRANSP)
1176:             {
1177:                 // This is a user or system message container
1178:                 bubble = lv_obj_get_child(obj, 0);
1179:             }
1180:             else
1181:             {
1182:                 // This might be an assistant message bubble itself
1183:                 bubble = obj;
1184:             }
1185:         }
1186:         else
1187:         {
1188:             // No child elements, might be other UI elements, skip
1189:             continue;
1190:         }
1191: 
1192:         if (bubble == nullptr)
1193:             continue;
1194: 
1195:         // Use saved user data to identify bubble type
1196:         void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(bubble);
1197:         if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr)
1198:         {
1199:             const char *bubble_type = static_cast<const char *>(bubble_type_ptr);
1200: 
1201:             // Apply correct color based on bubble type
1202:             if (strcmp(bubble_type, "user") == 0)
1203:             {
1204:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
1205:             }
1206:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "assistant") == 0)
1207:             {
1208:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
1209:             }
1210:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1211:             {
1212:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1213:             }
1214:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "image") == 0)
1215:             {
1216:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1217:             }
1218: 
1219:             // Update border color
1220:             lv_obj_set_style_border_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
1221: 
1222:             // Update text color for the message
1223:             if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(bubble) > 0)
1224:             {
1225:                 lv_obj_t *text = lv_obj_get_child(bubble, 0);
1226:                 if (text != nullptr)
1227:                 {
1228:                     // Set text color based on bubble type
1229:                     if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1230:                     {
1231:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
1232:                     }
1233:                     else
1234:                     {
1235:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1236:                     }
1237:                 }
1238:             }
1239:         }
1240:         else
1241:         {
1242:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "child[%lu] Bubble type is not found", i);
1243:         }
1244:     }
1245: #else
1246:     // Simple UI mode - just update the main chat message
1247:     if (chat_message_label_ != nullptr)
1248:     {
1249:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(chat_message_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1250:     }
1251: 
1252:     if (emoji_label_ != nullptr)
1253:     {
1254:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1255:     }
1256: 
1257:     // Update bottom bar background color with 50% opacity
1258:     if (bottom_bar_ != nullptr)
1259:     {
1260:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(bottom_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1261:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1262:     }
1263: #endif
1264: 
1265:     // Update low battery popup
1266:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
1267: 
1268:     // No errors occurred. Save theme to settings
1269:     Display::SetTheme(lvgl_theme);
1270: }

</file>
The `InitializeLcdThemes` function sets up light and dark display themes for the LCD interface, defining visual properties such as background colors, text styles, chat bubble appearances, and font configurations. It registers these themes with the theme manager to enable dynamic switching between them based on user preference or system state. This ensures a consistent and adaptable user interface experience across different lighting conditions or aesthetic preferences.

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness:
- The generated code correctly implements the core functionality of initializing LCD themes.
- Both light and dark themes are created with appropriate color schemes.
- Theme registration with the manager is properly handled.
- However, there are some semantic differences:
  * Uses std::make_unique instead of new + shared_ptr
  * Passes font objects directly rather than wrapping them in LvglBuiltInFont
  * Adds additional spacing configuration not present in ground truth
  * Color values differ from the ground truth (e.g., different shades for bubbles)

Structure Similarity:
- Overall flow is similar: create themes, set properties, register with manager
- Significant structural differences:
  * Uses std::make_unique instead of raw new + shared_ptr
  * Different method call patterns (RegisterTheme takes different parameters)
  * Additional lambda-based spacing configuration
  * Different approach to font handling
  * Uses std::move for registration

Functional Completeness:
- Covers all main functionalities: theme creation, property setting, registration
- Includes additional features (spacing configuration) beyond ground truth
- All required theme properties are set (colors, fonts, names)
- Missing some specific color mappings from ground truth but maintains equivalent functionality
- Properly handles both light and dark themes as required

223: 
224:     SetupUI();
225: }

227: MipiLcdDisplay::MipiLcdDisplay(esp_lcd_panel_io_handle_t panel_io, esp_lcd_panel_handle_t panel,
228:                                int width, int height, int offset_x, int offset_y,
229:                                bool mirror_x, bool mirror_y, bool swap_xy)
230:     : LcdDisplay(panel_io, panel, width, height)
231: {
232: 
233:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL library");
234:     lv_init();
235: 
236:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL port");
237:     lvgl_port_cfg_t port_cfg = ESP_LVGL_PORT_INIT_CONFIG();
238:     lvgl_port_init(&port_cfg);
239: 
240:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Adding LCD display");
241:     const lvgl_port_display_cfg_t disp_cfg = {
242:         .io_handle = panel_io,
243:         .panel_handle = panel,
244:         .control_handle = nullptr,
245:         .buffer_size = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_ * 50),
246:         .double_buffer = false,
247:         .hres = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_),
248:         .vres = static_cast<uint32_t>(height_),
249:         .monochrome = false,
250:         /* Rotation values must be same as used in esp_lcd for initial settings of the screen */
251:         .rotation = {
252:             .swap_xy = swap_xy,
253:             .mirror_x = mirror_x,
254:             .mirror_y = mirror_y,
255:         },
256:         .flags = {
257:             .buff_dma = true,
258:             .buff_spiram = false,
259:             .sw_rotate = true,
260:         },
261:     };
262: 
263:     const lvgl_port_display_dsi_cfg_t dpi_cfg = {
264:         .flags = {
265:             .avoid_tearing = false,
266:         }};
267:     display_ = lvgl_port_add_disp_dsi(&disp_cfg, &dpi_cfg);
268:     if (display_ == nullptr)
269:     {
270:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to add display");
271:         return;
272:     }
273: 
274:     if (offset_x != 0 || offset_y != 0)
275:     {
276:         lv_display_set_offset(display_, offset_x, offset_y);
277:     }
278: 
279:     SetupUI();
280: }

326:     }
327:     if (status_bar_ != nullptr)

329:         lv_obj_del(status_bar_);
330:     }
331:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)

368: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
369: void LcdDisplay::SetupUI()
370: {
371:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
372: 
373:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
374:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
375:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
376:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
377: 
378:     auto screen = lv_screen_active();
379:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
380:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
381:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(screen, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
382: 
383:     /* Container */
384:     container_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
385:     lv_obj_set_size(container_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_VER_RES);
386:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(container_, 0, 0);
387:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(container_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
388:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container_, 0, 0);
389:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container_, 0, 0);
390:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(container_, 0, 0);
391:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
392:     lv_obj_set_style_border_color(container_, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
393: 
394:     /* Layer 1: Top bar - for status icons */
395:     top_bar_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
396:     lv_obj_set_size(top_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
397:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(top_bar_, 0, 0);
398:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0); // 50% opacity background
399:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
400:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top_bar_, 0, 0);
401:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(top_bar_, 0, 0);
402:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
403:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
404:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_left(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
405:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_right(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
406:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
407:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_BETWEEN, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
408:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(top_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
409: 
410:     // Left icon
411:     network_label_ = lv_label_create(top_bar_);
412:     lv_label_set_text(network_label_, "");
413:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
414:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
415: 
416:     // Right icons container
417:     lv_obj_t *right_icons = lv_obj_create(top_bar_);
418:     lv_obj_set_size(right_icons, LV_SIZE_CONTENT, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
419:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(right_icons, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
420:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(right_icons, 0, 0);
421:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(right_icons, 0, 0);
422:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(right_icons, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
423:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(right_icons, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_END, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
424: 
425:     mute_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
426:     lv_label_set_text(mute_label_, "");
427:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
428:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
429: 
430:     battery_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
431:     lv_label_set_text(battery_label_, "");
432:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
433:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
434:     lv_obj_set_style_margin_left(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
435: 
436:     /* Layer 2: Status bar - for center text labels */
437:     status_bar_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
438:     lv_obj_set_size(status_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
439:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(status_bar_, 0, 0);
440:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(status_bar_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0); // Transparent background
441:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(status_bar_, 0, 0);
442:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(status_bar_, 0, 0);
443:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
444:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
445:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(status_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
446:     lv_obj_set_style_layout(status_bar_, LV_LAYOUT_NONE, 0); // Use absolute positioning
447:     lv_obj_align(status_bar_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);       // Overlap with top_bar_
448: 
449:     notification_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
450:     lv_obj_set_width(notification_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
451:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(notification_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
452:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
453:     lv_label_set_text(notification_label_, "");
454:     lv_obj_align(notification_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
455:     lv_obj_add_flag(notification_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
456: 
457:     status_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
458:     lv_obj_set_width(status_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
459:     lv_label_set_long_mode(status_label_, LV_LABEL_LONG_SCROLL_CIRCULAR);
460:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(status_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
461:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
462:     lv_label_set_text(status_label_, Lang::Strings::INITIALIZING);
463:     lv_obj_align(status_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
464: 
465:     /* Content - Chat area */
466:     content_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
467:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(content_, 0, 0);
468:     lv_obj_set_width(content_, LV_HOR_RES);
469:     lv_obj_set_flex_grow(content_, 1);
470:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
471:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(content_, 0, 0);
472:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(content_, lvgl_theme->chat_background_color(), 0); // Background for chat area
473: 
474:     // Enable scrolling for chat content
475:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(content_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
476:     lv_obj_set_scroll_dir(content_, LV_DIR_VER);
477: 
478:     // Create a flex container for chat messages
479:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(content_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
480:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(content_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START);
481:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0); // Space between messages
482: 
483:     // We'll create chat messages dynamically in SetChatMessage
484:     chat_message_label_ = nullptr;
485: 
486:     low_battery_popup_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
487:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(low_battery_popup_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
488:     lv_obj_set_size(low_battery_popup_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.9, text_font->line_height * 2);
489:     lv_obj_align(low_battery_popup_, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -lvgl_theme->spacing(4));
490:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
491:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
492:     low_battery_label_ = lv_label_create(low_battery_popup_);
493:     lv_label_set_text(low_battery_label_, Lang::Strings::BATTERY_NEED_CHARGE);
494:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(low_battery_label_, lv_color_white(), 0);
495:     lv_obj_center(low_battery_label_);
496:     lv_obj_add_flag(low_battery_popup_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
497: 
498:     emoji_image_ = lv_img_create(screen);
499:     lv_obj_align(emoji_image_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, text_font->line_height + lvgl_theme->spacing(8));
500: 
501:     // Display AI logo while booting
502:     emoji_label_ = lv_label_create(screen);
503:     lv_obj_center(emoji_label_);
504:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(emoji_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
505:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
506:     lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, FONT_AWESOME_MICROCHIP_AI);
507: }
508: #if CONFIG_IDF_TARGET_ESP32P4
509: #define MAX_MESSAGES 40
510: #else
511: #define MAX_MESSAGES 20
512: #endif
513: void LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage(const char *role, const char *content)
514: {
515:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
516:     if (content_ == nullptr)
517:     {
518:         return;
519:     }
520: 
521:     // Check if message count exceeds limit
522:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
523:     if (child_count >= MAX_MESSAGES)
524:     {
525:         // Delete the oldest message (first child object)
526:         lv_obj_t *first_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, 0);
527:         lv_obj_t *last_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
528:         if (first_child != nullptr)
529:         {
530:             lv_obj_del(first_child);
531:         }
532:         // Scroll to the last message immediately
533:         if (last_child != nullptr)
534:         {
535:             lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(last_child, LV_ANIM_OFF);
536:         }
537:     }
538: 
539:     // Collapse system messages (if it's a system message, check if the last message is also a system message)
540:     if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
541:     {
542:         if (child_count > 0)
543:         {
544:             // Get the last message container
545:             lv_obj_t *last_container = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
546:             if (last_container != nullptr && lv_obj_get_child_cnt(last_container) > 0)
547:             {
548:                 // Get the bubble inside the container
549:                 lv_obj_t *last_bubble = lv_obj_get_child(last_container, 0);
550:                 if (last_bubble != nullptr)
551:                 {
552:                     // Check if bubble type is system message
553:                     void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(last_bubble);
554:                     if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr && strcmp((const char *)bubble_type_ptr, "system") == 0)
555:                     {
556:                         // If the last message is also a system message, delete it
557:                         lv_obj_del(last_container);
558:                     }
559:                 }
560:             }
561:         }
562:     }
563:     else
564:     {
565:         // Hide the centered AI logo
566:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
567:     }
568: 
569:     // Avoid empty message boxes
570:     if (strlen(content) == 0)
571:     {
572:         return;
573:     }
574: 
575:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
576:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
577: 
578:     // Create a message bubble
579:     lv_obj_t *msg_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
580:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(msg_bubble, 8, 0);
581:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(msg_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
582:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
583:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
584: 
585:     // Create the message text
586:     lv_obj_t *msg_text = lv_label_create(msg_bubble);
587:     lv_label_set_text(msg_text, content);
588: 
589:     // Calculate actual text width
590:     lv_coord_t text_width = lv_txt_get_width(content, strlen(content), text_font, 0);
591: 
592:     // Calculate bubble width
593:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 85 / 100 - 16; // 85% of screen width
594:     lv_coord_t min_width = 20;
595:     lv_coord_t bubble_width;
596: 
597:     // Ensure text width is not less than minimum width
598:     if (text_width < min_width)
599:     {
600:         text_width = min_width;
601:     }
602: 
603:     // If text width is less than max width, use text width
604:     if (text_width < max_width)
605:     {
606:         bubble_width = text_width;
607:     }
608:     else
609:     {
610:         bubble_width = max_width;
611:     }
612: 
613:     // Set message text width
614:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_text, bubble_width); // Subtract padding
615:     lv_label_set_long_mode(msg_text, LV_LABEL_LONG_WRAP);
616: 
617:     // Set bubble width
618:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, bubble_width);
619:     lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
620: 
621:     // Set alignment and style based on message role
622:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
623:     {
624:         // User messages are right-aligned with green background
625:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
626:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
627:         // Set text color for contrast
628:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
629: 
630:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
631:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"user");
632: 
633:         // Set appropriate width for content
634:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
635:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
636: 
637:         // Don't grow
638:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
639:     }
640:     else if (strcmp(role, "assistant") == 0)
641:     {
642:         // Assistant messages are left-aligned with white background
643:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
644:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
645:         // Set text color for contrast
646:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
647: 
648:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
649:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"assistant");
650: 
651:         // Set appropriate width for content
652:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
653:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
654: 
655:         // Don't grow
656:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
657:     }
658:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
659:     {
660:         // System messages are center-aligned with light gray background
661:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
662:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
663:         // Set text color for contrast
664:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
665: 
666:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
667:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"system");
668: 
669:         // Set appropriate width for content
670:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
671:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
672: 
673:         // Don't grow
674:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
675:     }
676: 
677:     // Create a full-width container for user messages to ensure right alignment
678:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
679:     {
680:         // Create a full-width container
681:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
682:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
683:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
684: 
685:         // Make container transparent and borderless
686:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
687:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
688:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
689: 
690:         // Move the message bubble into this container
691:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
692: 
693:         // Right align the bubble in the container
694:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_RIGHT_MID, -25, 0);
695: 
696:         // Auto-scroll to this container
697:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
698:     }
699:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
700:     {
701:         // Create full-width container for system messages to ensure center alignment
702:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
703:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
704:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
705: 
706:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
707:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
708:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
709: 
710:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
711:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
712:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
713:     }
714:     else
715:     {
716:         // For assistant messages
717:         // Left align assistant messages
718:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
719: 
720:         // Auto-scroll to the message bubble
721:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(msg_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
722:     }
723: 
724:     // Store reference to the latest message label
725:     chat_message_label_ = msg_text;
726: }
727: 
728: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
729: {
730:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
731:     if (content_ == nullptr)
732:     {
733:         return;
734:     }
735: 
736:     if (image == nullptr)
737:     {
738:         return;
739:     }
740: 
741:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
742:     // Create a message bubble for image preview
743:     lv_obj_t *img_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
744:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(img_bubble, 8, 0);
745:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(img_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
746:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(img_bubble, 0, 0);
747:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
748: 
749:     // Set image bubble background color (similar to system message)
750:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
751:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(img_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
752: 
753:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
754:     lv_obj_set_user_data(img_bubble, (void *)"image");
755: 
756:     // Create the image object inside the bubble
757:     lv_obj_t *preview_image = lv_image_create(img_bubble);
758: 
759:     // Calculate appropriate size for the image
760:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 70 / 100;  // 70% of screen width
761:     lv_coord_t max_height = LV_VER_RES * 50 / 100; // 50% of screen height
762: 
763:     // Calculate zoom factor to fit within maximum dimensions
764:     auto img_dsc = image->image_dsc();
765:     lv_coord_t img_width = img_dsc->header.w;
766:     lv_coord_t img_height = img_dsc->header.h;
767:     if (img_width == 0 || img_height == 0)
768:     {
769:         img_width = max_width;
770:         img_height = max_height;
771:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid image dimensions: %ld x %ld, using default dimensions: %ld x %ld", img_width, img_height, max_width, max_height);
772:     }
773: 
774:     lv_coord_t zoom_w = (max_width * 256) / img_width;
775:     lv_coord_t zoom_h = (max_height * 256) / img_height;
776:     lv_coord_t zoom = (zoom_w < zoom_h) ? zoom_w : zoom_h;
777: 
778:     // Ensure zoom doesn't exceed 256 (100%)
779:     if (zoom > 256)
780:         zoom = 256;
781: 
782:     // Set image properties
783:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image, img_dsc);
784:     lv_image_set_scale(preview_image, zoom);
785: 
786:     // Add event handler to clean up LvglImage when image is deleted
787:     // We need to transfer ownership of the unique_ptr to the event callback
788:     LvglImage *raw_image = image.release(); // Release ownership of smart pointer
789:     lv_obj_add_event_cb(preview_image, [](lv_event_t *e)
790:                         {
791:         LvglImage* img = (LvglImage*)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
792:         if (img != nullptr) {
793:             delete img; // Properly release memory by deleting LvglImage object
794:         } }, LV_EVENT_DELETE, (void *)raw_image);
795: 
796:     // Calculate actual scaled image dimensions
797:     lv_coord_t scaled_width = (img_width * zoom) / 256;
798:     lv_coord_t scaled_height = (img_height * zoom) / 256;
799: 
800:     // Set bubble size to be 16 pixels larger than the image (8 pixels on each side)
801:     lv_obj_set_width(img_bubble, scaled_width + 16);
802:     lv_obj_set_height(img_bubble, scaled_height + 16);
803: 
804:     // Don't grow in flex layout
805:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(img_bubble, 0, 0);
806: 
807:     // Center the image within the bubble
808:     lv_obj_center(preview_image);
809: 
810:     // Left align the image bubble like assistant messages
811:     lv_obj_align(img_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
812: 
813:     // Auto-scroll to the image bubble
814:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(img_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
815: }
816: #else

972: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
973: {
974:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
975:     if (preview_image_ == nullptr)
976:     {
977:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Preview image is not initialized");
978:         return;
979:     }
980: 
981:     if (image == nullptr)
982:     {
983:         esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
984:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
985:         lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
986:         preview_image_cached_.reset();
987:         if (gif_controller_)
988:         {
989:             gif_controller_->Start();
990:         }
991:         return;
992:     }
993: 
994:     preview_image_cached_ = std::move(image);
995:     auto img_dsc = preview_image_cached_->image_dsc();
996:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image_, img_dsc);
997:     if (img_dsc->header.w > 0 && img_dsc->header.h > 0)
998:     {
999:         // zoom factor 0.5
1000:         lv_image_set_scale(preview_image_, 128 * width_ / img_dsc->header.w);
1001:     }
1002: 
1003:     // Hide emoji_box_
1004:     if (gif_controller_)
1005:     {
1006:         gif_controller_->Stop();
1007:     }
1008:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1009:     lv_obj_remove_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1010:     esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
1011:     ESP_ERROR_CHECK(esp_timer_start_once(preview_timer_, PREVIEW_IMAGE_DURATION_MS * 1000));
1012: }

1025: void LcdDisplay::SetEmotion(const char *emotion)
1026: {
1027:     // Stop any running GIF animation
1028:     if (gif_controller_)
1029:     {
1030:         DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1031:         gif_controller_->Stop();
1032:         gif_controller_.reset();
1033:     }
1034: 
1035:     if (emoji_image_ == nullptr)
1036:     {
1037:         return;
1038:     }
1039: 
1040:     auto emoji_collection = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_)->emoji_collection();
1041:     auto image = emoji_collection != nullptr ? emoji_collection->GetEmojiImage(emotion) : nullptr;
1042:     if (image == nullptr)
1043:     {
1044:         const char *utf8 = font_awesome_get_utf8(emotion);
1045:         if (utf8 != nullptr && emoji_label_ != nullptr)
1046:         {
1047:             DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1048:             lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, utf8);
1049:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1050:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1051:         }
1052:         return;
1053:     }
1054: 
1055:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1056:     if (image->IsGif())
1057:     {
1058:         // Create new GIF controller
1059:         gif_controller_ = std::make_unique<LvglGif>(image->image_dsc());
1060: 
1061:         if (gif_controller_->IsLoaded())
1062:         {
1063:             // Set up frame update callback
1064:             gif_controller_->SetFrameCallback([this]()
1065:                                               { lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc()); });
1066: 
1067:             // Set initial frame and start animation
1068:             lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc());
1069:             gif_controller_->Start();
1070: 
1071:             // Show GIF, hide others
1072:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1073:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1074:         }
1075:         else
1076:         {
1077:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to load GIF for emotion: %s", emotion);
1078:             gif_controller_.reset();
1079:         }
1080:     }
1081:     else
1082:     {
1083:         lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, image->image_dsc());
1084:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1085:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1086:     }
1087: 
1088: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1089:     // In WeChat message style, if emotion is neutral, don't display it
1090:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1091:     if (strcmp(emotion, "neutral") == 0 && child_count > 0)
1092:     {
1093:         // Stop GIF animation if running
1094:         if (gif_controller_)
1095:         {
1096:             gif_controller_->Stop();
1097:             gif_controller_.reset();
1098:         }
1099: 
1100:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1101:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1102:     }
1103: #endif
1104: }
1105: 
1106: void LcdDisplay::SetTheme(Theme *theme)
1107: {
1108:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1109: 
1110:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(theme);
1111: 
1112:     // Get the active screen
1113:     lv_obj_t *screen = lv_screen_active();
1114: 
1115:     // Set font
1116:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
1117:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
1118:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
1119: 
1120:     if (text_font->line_height >= 40)
1121:     {
1122:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1123:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1124:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1125:     }
1126:     else
1127:     {
1128:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
1129:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
1130:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
1131:     }
1132: 
1133:     // Set parent text color
1134:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
1135:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1136: 
1137:     // Set background image
1138:     if (lvgl_theme->background_image() != nullptr)
1139:     {
1140:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, lvgl_theme->background_image()->image_dsc(), 0);
1141:     }
1142:     else
1143:     {
1144:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, nullptr, 0);
1145:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1146:     }
1147: 
1148:     // Update top bar background color with 50% opacity
1149:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
1150:     {
1151:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1152:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1153:     }
1154: 
1155:     // Update status bar elements
1156:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1157:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1158:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1159:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1160:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1161:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1162: 
1163:     // If we have the chat message style, update all message bubbles
1164: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1165:     // Set content background opacity
1166:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(content_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
1167: 
1168:     // Iterate through all children of content (message containers or bubbles)
1169:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1170:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < child_count; i++)
1171:     {
1172:         lv_obj_t *obj = lv_obj_get_child(content_, i);
1173:         if (obj == nullptr)
1174:             continue;
1175: 
1176:         lv_obj_t *bubble = nullptr;
1177: 
1178:         // Check if this object is a container or bubble
1179:         // If it's a container (user or system message), get its child as bubble
1180:         // If it's a bubble (assistant message), use it directly
1181:         if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(obj) > 0)
1182:         {
1183:             // Might be a container, check if it's a user or system message container

1186:             if (bg_opa == LV_OPA_TRANSP)

1192:             {

1194:                 bubble = obj;

1197:         else
1198:         {
1199:             // No child elements, might be other UI elements, skip
1200:             continue;

1202: 
1203:         if (bubble == nullptr)
1204:             continue;
1205: 
1206:         // Use saved user data to identify bubble type
1207:         void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(bubble);
1208:         if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr)
1209:         {
1210:             const char *bubble_type = static_cast<const char *>(bubble_type_ptr);
1211: 
1212:             // Apply correct color based on bubble type
1213:             if (strcmp(bubble_type, "user") == 0)
1214:             {
1215:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
1216:             }
1217:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "assistant") == 0)
1218:             {
1219:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
1220:             }
1221:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1222:             {
1223:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1224:             }
1225:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "image") == 0)
1226:             {

1228:             }
1229: 
1230:             // Update border color
1231:             lv_obj_set_style_border_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
1232: 
1233:             // Update text color for the message
1234:             if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(bubble) > 0)
1235:             {
1236:                 lv_obj_t *text = lv_obj_get_child(bubble, 0);
1237:                 if (text != nullptr)

The `LcdDisplay` constructor initializes the LCD display with the given panel IO and dimensions, sets up themes from stored settings, and creates a timer to automatically clear the preview image after a set duration. It prepares the display for rendering UI elements and manages theme configuration and preview image timing.

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness:
- The generated code initializes member variables in the initializer list, which aligns with good C++ practices.
- However, the logic inside the constructor differs significantly:
  - The ground truth calls `InitializeLcdThemes()` and loads a theme via `Settings`, while the generated code does not include these steps.
  - The timer callback in the generated version has more complex UI-related logic involving hiding/showing objects and starting a GIF controller, whereas the ground truth simply sets the preview image to null.
  - These differences indicate that although both constructors create timers, their purposes and behaviors diverge semantically.

Structure Similarity:
- Both use member initializer lists for setting up fields like `panel_io_`, `panel_`, `width_`, and `height_`.
- Both define an `esp_timer_create_args_t` struct and call `esp_timer_create()`.
- Differences arise in additional initializations of many UI components (`container_`, `top_bar_`, etc.) in the generated code that are absent from the ground truth.
- Function signature matches except that the generated code includes extra initializations suggesting it's part of a richer class definition not shown in the prompt or ground truth.

Functional Completeness:
- Missing core functionality such as theme initialization and loading from settings.
- Includes additional features (e.g., emoji box handling, GIF control) not present in the reference implementation.
- Timer behavior is extended beyond what is required by the ground truth.
- Therefore, it doesn't fully match the minimal functional scope implied by the task query and ground truth but goes well beyond into unrelated areas.

results.description: The `SpiLcdDisplay` constructor initializes and configures an SPI-based LCD display for use with the LVGL graphics library. It sets up the display hardware, clears the screen to white, enables the display, initializes LVGL with optional PSRAM caching, and registers the display with LVGL for rendering UI elements. The function also applies display orientation settings and offsets as specified.

363:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
364:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(status_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
365:     lv_obj_set_style_layout(status_bar_, LV_LAYOUT_NONE, 0); // Use absolute positioning
366:     lv_obj_align(status_bar_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);       // Overlap with top_bar_
367: 
368:     notification_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
369:     lv_obj_set_width(notification_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
370:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(notification_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
371:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
372:     lv_label_set_text(notification_label_, "");
373:     lv_obj_align(notification_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
374:     lv_obj_add_flag(notification_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
375: 
376:     status_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
377:     lv_obj_set_width(status_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
378:     lv_label_set_long_mode(status_label_, LV_LABEL_LONG_SCROLL_CIRCULAR);
379:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(status_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
380:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
381:     lv_label_set_text(status_label_, Lang::Strings::INITIALIZING);
382:     lv_obj_align(status_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
383: 
384:     /* Content - Chat area */
385:     content_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
386:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(content_, 0, 0);
387:     lv_obj_set_width(content_, LV_HOR_RES);
388:     lv_obj_set_flex_grow(content_, 1);
389:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
390:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(content_, 0, 0);
391:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(content_, lvgl_theme->chat_background_color(), 0); // Background for chat area
392: 
393:     // Enable scrolling for chat content
394:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(content_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
395:     lv_obj_set_scroll_dir(content_, LV_DIR_VER);
396: 
397:     // Create a flex container for chat messages
398:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(content_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
399:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(content_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START);
400:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0); // Space between messages
401: 
402:     // We'll create chat messages dynamically in SetChatMessage
403:     chat_message_label_ = nullptr;
404: 
405:     low_battery_popup_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
406:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(low_battery_popup_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
407:     lv_obj_set_size(low_battery_popup_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.9, text_font->line_height * 2);
408:     lv_obj_align(low_battery_popup_, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -lvgl_theme->spacing(4));
409:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
410:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
411:     low_battery_label_ = lv_label_create(low_battery_popup_);
412:     lv_label_set_text(low_battery_label_, Lang::Strings::BATTERY_NEED_CHARGE);
413:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(low_battery_label_, lv_color_white(), 0);
414:     lv_obj_center(low_battery_label_);
415:     lv_obj_add_flag(low_battery_popup_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
416: 
417:     emoji_image_ = lv_img_create(screen);
418:     lv_obj_align(emoji_image_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, text_font->line_height + lvgl_theme->spacing(8));
419: 
420:     // Display AI logo while booting
421:     emoji_label_ = lv_label_create(screen);
422:     lv_obj_center(emoji_label_);
423:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(emoji_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
424:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
425:     lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, FONT_AWESOME_MICROCHIP_AI);
426: }
427: #if CONFIG_IDF_TARGET_ESP32P4
428: #define MAX_MESSAGES 40
429: #else
430: #define MAX_MESSAGES 20
431: #endif
432: void LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage(const char *role, const char *content)
433: {
434:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
435:     if (content_ == nullptr)
436:     {
437:         return;
438:     }
439: 
440:     // Check if message count exceeds limit
441:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
442:     if (child_count >= MAX_MESSAGES)
443:     {
444:         // Delete the oldest message (first child object)
445:         lv_obj_t *first_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, 0);
446:         lv_obj_t *last_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
447:         if (first_child != nullptr)
448:         {
449:             lv_obj_del(first_child);
450:         }
451:         // Scroll to the last message immediately
452:         if (last_child != nullptr)
453:         {
454:             lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(last_child, LV_ANIM_OFF);
455:         }
456:     }
457: 
458:     // Collapse system messages (if it's a system message, check if the last message is also a system message)
459:     if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
460:     {
461:         if (child_count > 0)
462:         {
463:             // Get the last message container
464:             lv_obj_t *last_container = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
465:             if (last_container != nullptr && lv_obj_get_child_cnt(last_container) > 0)
466:             {
467:                 // Get the bubble inside the container
468:                 lv_obj_t *last_bubble = lv_obj_get_child(last_container, 0);
469:                 if (last_bubble != nullptr)
470:                 {
471:                     // Check if bubble type is system message
472:                     void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(last_bubble);
473:                     if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr && strcmp((const char *)bubble_type_ptr, "system") == 0)
474:                     {
475:                         // If the last message is also a system message, delete it
476:                         lv_obj_del(last_container);
477:                     }
478:                 }
479:             }
480:         }
481:     }
482:     else
483:     {
484:         // Hide the centered AI logo
485:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
486:     }
487: 
488:     // Avoid empty message boxes
489:     if (strlen(content) == 0)
490:     {
491:         return;
492:     }
493: 
494:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
495:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
496: 
497:     // Create a message bubble
498:     lv_obj_t *msg_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
499:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(msg_bubble, 8, 0);
500:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(msg_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
501:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
502:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
503: 
504:     // Create the message text
505:     lv_obj_t *msg_text = lv_label_create(msg_bubble);
506:     lv_label_set_text(msg_text, content);
507: 
508:     // Calculate actual text width
509:     lv_coord_t text_width = lv_txt_get_width(content, strlen(content), text_font, 0);
510: 
511:     // Calculate bubble width
512:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 85 / 100 - 16; // 85% of screen width
513:     lv_coord_t min_width = 20;
514:     lv_coord_t bubble_width;
515: 
516:     // Ensure text width is not less than minimum width
517:     if (text_width < min_width)
518:     {
519:         text_width = min_width;
520:     }
521: 
522:     // If text width is less than max width, use text width
523:     if (text_width < max_width)
524:     {
525:         bubble_width = text_width;
526:     }
527:     else
528:     {
529:         bubble_width = max_width;
530:     }
531: 
532:     // Set message text width
533:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_text, bubble_width); // Subtract padding
534:     lv_label_set_long_mode(msg_text, LV_LABEL_LONG_WRAP);
535: 
536:     // Set bubble width
537:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, bubble_width);
538:     lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
539: 
540:     // Set alignment and style based on message role
541:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
542:     {
543:         // User messages are right-aligned with green background
544:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
545:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
546:         // Set text color for contrast
547:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
548: 
549:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
550:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"user");
551: 
552:         // Set appropriate width for content
553:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
554:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
555: 
556:         // Don't grow
557:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
558:     }
559:     else if (strcmp(role, "assistant") == 0)
560:     {
561:         // Assistant messages are left-aligned with white background
562:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
563:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
564:         // Set text color for contrast
565:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
566: 
567:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
568:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"assistant");
569: 
570:         // Set appropriate width for content
571:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
572:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
573: 
574:         // Don't grow
575:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
576:     }
577:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
578:     {
579:         // System messages are center-aligned with light gray background
580:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
581:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
582:         // Set text color for contrast
583:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
584: 
585:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
586:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"system");
587: 
588:         // Set appropriate width for content
589:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
590:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
591: 
592:         // Don't grow
593:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
594:     }
595: 
596:     // Create a full-width container for user messages to ensure right alignment
597:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
598:     {
599:         // Create a full-width container
600:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
601:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
602:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
603: 
604:         // Make container transparent and borderless
605:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
606:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
607:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
608: 
609:         // Move the message bubble into this container
610:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
611: 
612:         // Right align the bubble in the container
613:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_RIGHT_MID, -25, 0);
614: 
615:         // Auto-scroll to this container
616:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
617:     }
618:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
619:     {
620:         // Create full-width container for system messages to ensure center alignment
621:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
622:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
623:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
624: 
625:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
626:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
627:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
628: 
629:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
630:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
631:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
632:     }
633:     else
634:     {
635:         // For assistant messages
636:         // Left align assistant messages
637:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
638: 
639:         // Auto-scroll to the message bubble
640:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(msg_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
641:     }
642: 
643:     // Store reference to the latest message label
644:     chat_message_label_ = msg_text;
645: }

647: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
648: {
649:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
650:     if (content_ == nullptr)
651:     {
652:         return;
653:     }
654: 
655:     if (image == nullptr)
656:     {
657:         return;
658:     }
659: 
660:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
661:     // Create a message bubble for image preview
662:     lv_obj_t *img_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
663:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(img_bubble, 8, 0);
664:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(img_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
665:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(img_bubble, 0, 0);
666:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
667: 
668:     // Set image bubble background color (similar to system message)
669:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
670:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(img_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
671: 
672:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
673:     lv_obj_set_user_data(img_bubble, (void *)"image");
674: 
675:     // Create the image object inside the bubble
676:     lv_obj_t *preview_image = lv_image_create(img_bubble);
677: 
678:     // Calculate appropriate size for the image
679:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 70 / 100;  // 70% of screen width
680:     lv_coord_t max_height = LV_VER_RES * 50 / 100; // 50% of screen height
681: 
682:     // Calculate zoom factor to fit within maximum dimensions
683:     auto img_dsc = image->image_dsc();
684:     lv_coord_t img_width = img_dsc->header.w;
685:     lv_coord_t img_height = img_dsc->header.h;
686:     if (img_width == 0 || img_height == 0)
687:     {
688:         img_width = max_width;
689:         img_height = max_height;
690:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid image dimensions: %ld x %ld, using default dimensions: %ld x %ld", img_width, img_height, max_width, max_height);
691:     }
692: 
693:     lv_coord_t zoom_w = (max_width * 256) / img_width;
694:     lv_coord_t zoom_h = (max_height * 256) / img_height;
695:     lv_coord_t zoom = (zoom_w < zoom_h) ? zoom_w : zoom_h;
696: 
697:     // Ensure zoom doesn't exceed 256 (100%)
698:     if (zoom > 256)
699:         zoom = 256;
700: 
701:     // Set image properties
702:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image, img_dsc);
703:     lv_image_set_scale(preview_image, zoom);
704: 
705:     // Add event handler to clean up LvglImage when image is deleted
706:     // We need to transfer ownership of the unique_ptr to the event callback
707:     LvglImage *raw_image = image.release(); // Release ownership of smart pointer
708:     lv_obj_add_event_cb(preview_image, [](lv_event_t *e)
709:                         {
710:         LvglImage* img = (LvglImage*)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
711:         if (img != nullptr) {
712:             delete img; // Properly release memory by deleting LvglImage object
713:         } }, LV_EVENT_DELETE, (void *)raw_image);
714: 
715:     // Calculate actual scaled image dimensions
716:     lv_coord_t scaled_width = (img_width * zoom) / 256;
717:     lv_coord_t scaled_height = (img_height * zoom) / 256;
718: 
719:     // Set bubble size to be 16 pixels larger than the image (8 pixels on each side)
720:     lv_obj_set_width(img_bubble, scaled_width + 16);
721:     lv_obj_set_height(img_bubble, scaled_height + 16);
722: 
723:     // Don't grow in flex layout
724:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(img_bubble, 0, 0);
725: 
726:     // Center the image within the bubble
727:     lv_obj_center(preview_image);
728: 
729:     // Left align the image bubble like assistant messages
730:     lv_obj_align(img_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
731: 
732:     // Auto-scroll to the image bubble
733:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(img_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
734: }
735: #else
736: void LcdDisplay::SetupUI()
737: {
738:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
739:     LvglTheme *lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
740:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
741:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
742:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
743: 
744:     auto screen = lv_screen_active();
745:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
746:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
747:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(screen, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
748: 
749:     /* Container - used as background */
750:     container_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
751:     lv_obj_set_size(container_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_VER_RES);
752:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(container_, 0, 0);
753:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container_, 0, 0);
754:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container_, 0, 0);
755:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
756:     lv_obj_set_style_border_color(container_, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
757: 
758:     /* Bottom layer: emoji_box_ - centered display */
759:     emoji_box_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
760:     lv_obj_set_size(emoji_box_, LV_SIZE_CONTENT, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
761:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(emoji_box_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
762:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(emoji_box_, 0, 0);
763:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(emoji_box_, 0, 0);
764:     lv_obj_align(emoji_box_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
765: 
766:     emoji_label_ = lv_label_create(emoji_box_);
767:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(emoji_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
768:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
769:     lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, FONT_AWESOME_MICROCHIP_AI);
770: 
771:     emoji_image_ = lv_img_create(emoji_box_);
772:     lv_obj_center(emoji_image_);
773:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
774: 
775:     /* Middle layer: preview_image_ - centered display */
776:     preview_image_ = lv_image_create(screen);
777:     lv_obj_set_size(preview_image_, width_ / 2, height_ / 2);
778:     lv_obj_align(preview_image_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
779:     lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
780: 
781:     /* Layer 1: Top bar - for status icons */
782:     top_bar_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
783:     lv_obj_set_size(top_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
784:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(top_bar_, 0, 0);
785:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0); // 50% opacity background
786:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
787:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top_bar_, 0, 0);
788:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(top_bar_, 0, 0);
789:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
790:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
791:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_left(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
792:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_right(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
793:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
794:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_BETWEEN, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
795:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(top_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
796:     lv_obj_align(top_bar_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);
797: 
798:     // Left icon
799:     network_label_ = lv_label_create(top_bar_);
800:     lv_label_set_text(network_label_, "");
801:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
802:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
803: 
804:     // Right icons container
805:     lv_obj_t *right_icons = lv_obj_create(top_bar_);
806:     lv_obj_set_size(right_icons, LV_SIZE_CONTENT, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
807:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(right_icons, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
808:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(right_icons, 0, 0);
809:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(right_icons, 0, 0);
810:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(right_icons, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
811:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(right_icons, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_END, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
812: 
813:     mute_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
814:     lv_label_set_text(mute_label_, "");
815:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
816:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);

892: {

944: void LcdDisplay::SetEmotion(const char *emotion)
945: {
946:     // Stop any running GIF animation
947:     if (gif_controller_)
948:     {
949:         DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
950:         gif_controller_->Stop();
951:         gif_controller_.reset();
952:     }
953: 
954:     if (emoji_image_ == nullptr)
955:     {
956:         return;
957:     }
958: 
959:     auto emoji_collection = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_)->emoji_collection();
960:     auto image = emoji_collection != nullptr ? emoji_collection->GetEmojiImage(emotion) : nullptr;
961:     if (image == nullptr)
962:     {
963:         const char *utf8 = font_awesome_get_utf8(emotion);
964:         if (utf8 != nullptr && emoji_label_ != nullptr)
965:         {
966:             DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
967:             lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, utf8);
968:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
969:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
970:         }
971:         return;
972:     }
973: 
974:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
975:     if (image->IsGif())
976:     {
977:         // Create new GIF controller
978:         gif_controller_ = std::make_unique<LvglGif>(image->image_dsc());
979: 
980:         if (gif_controller_->IsLoaded())
981:         {
982:             // Set up frame update callback
983:             gif_controller_->SetFrameCallback([this]()
984:                                               { lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc()); });
985: 
986:             // Set initial frame and start animation
987:             lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc());
988:             gif_controller_->Start();
989: 
990:             // Show GIF, hide others
991:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
992:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
993:         }
994:         else
995:         {
996:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to load GIF for emotion: %s", emotion);
997:             gif_controller_.reset();
998:         }
999:     }
1000:     else
1001:     {
1002:         lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, image->image_dsc());
1003:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1004:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1005:     }
1006: 
1007: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1008:     // In WeChat message style, if emotion is neutral, don't display it
1009:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1010:     if (strcmp(emotion, "neutral") == 0 && child_count > 0)
1011:     {
1012:         // Stop GIF animation if running
1013:         if (gif_controller_)
1014:         {
1015:             gif_controller_->Stop();
1016:             gif_controller_.reset();
1017:         }
1018: 
1019:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1020:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1021:     }
1022: #endif
1023: }

1025: void LcdDisplay::SetTheme(Theme *theme)
1026: {
1027:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1028: 
1029:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(theme);
1030: 
1031:     // Get the active screen
1032:     lv_obj_t *screen = lv_screen_active();
1033: 
1034:     // Set font
1035:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
1036:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
1037:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
1038: 
1039:     if (text_font->line_height >= 40)
1040:     {
1041:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1042:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1043:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1044:     }
1045:     else
1046:     {
1047:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
1048:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
1049:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
1050:     }
1051: 
1052:     // Set parent text color
1053:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
1054:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1055: 
1056:     // Set background image
1057:     if (lvgl_theme->background_image() != nullptr)
1058:     {
1059:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, lvgl_theme->background_image()->image_dsc(), 0);
1060:     }
1061:     else
1062:     {
1063:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, nullptr, 0);
1064:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1065:     }
1066: 
1067:     // Update top bar background color with 50% opacity
1068:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
1069:     {
1070:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1071:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1072:     }
1073: 
1074:     // Update status bar elements
1075:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1076:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1077:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1078:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1079:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1080:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1081: 
1082:     // If we have the chat message style, update all message bubbles
1083: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1084:     // Set content background opacity
1085:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(content_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
1086: 
1087:     // Iterate through all children of content (message containers or bubbles)
1088:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1089:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < child_count; i++)
1090:     {
1091:         lv_obj_t *obj = lv_obj_get_child(content_, i);
1092:         if (obj == nullptr)
1093:             continue;
1094: 
1095:         lv_obj_t *bubble = nullptr;
1096: 
1097:         // Check if this object is a container or bubble
1098:         // If it's a container (user or system message), get its child as bubble
1099:         // If it's a bubble (assistant message), use it directly
1100:         if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(obj) > 0)
1101:         {
1102:             // Might be a container, check if it's a user or system message container
1103:             // User and system message containers are transparent
1104:             lv_opa_t bg_opa = lv_obj_get_style_bg_opa(obj, 0);
1105:             if (bg_opa == LV_OPA_TRANSP)
1106:             {
1107:                 // This is a user or system message container
1108:                 bubble = lv_obj_get_child(obj, 0);
1109:             }
1110:             else
1111:             {
1112:                 // This might be an assistant message bubble itself
1113:                 bubble = obj;
1114:             }
1115:         }
1116:         else
1117:         {
1118:             // No child elements, might be other UI elements, skip
1119:             continue;
1120:         }
1121: 
1122:         if (bubble == nullptr)
1123:             continue;
1124: 
1125:         // Use saved user data to identify bubble type
1126:         void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(bubble);
1127:         if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr)
1128:         {
1129:             const char *bubble_type = static_cast<const char *>(bubble_type_ptr);
1130: 
1131:             // Apply correct color based on bubble type
1132:             if (strcmp(bubble_type, "user") == 0)
1133:             {
1134:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
1135:             }
1136:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "assistant") == 0)
1137:             {
1138:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
1139:             }
1140:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1141:             {
1142:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1143:             }
1144:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "image") == 0)
1145:             {
1146:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1147:             }
1148: 
1149:             // Update border color
1150:             lv_obj_set_style_border_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
1151: 
1152:             // Update text color for the message
1153:             if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(bubble) > 0)
1154:             {
1155:                 lv_obj_t *text = lv_obj_get_child(bubble, 0);
1156:                 if (text != nullptr)
1157:                 {
1158:                     // Set text color based on bubble type
1159:                     if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1160:                     {
1161:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
1162:                     }
1163:                     else
1164:                     {
1165:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1166:                     }
1167:                 }
1168:             }
1169:         }
1170:         else
1171:         {
1172:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "child[%lu] Bubble type is not found", i);
1173:         }
1174:     }
1175: #else
1176:     // Simple UI mode - just update the main chat message
1177:     if (chat_message_label_ != nullptr)
1178:     {
1179:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(chat_message_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1180:     }
1181: 
1182:     if (emoji_label_ != nullptr)
1183:     {
1184:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1185:     }
1186: 
1187:     // Update bottom bar background color with 50% opacity
1188:     if (bottom_bar_ != nullptr)
1189:     {
1190:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(bottom_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1191:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1192:     }
1193: #endif
1194: 
1195:     // Update low battery popup
1196:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
1197: 
1198:     // No errors occurred. Save theme to settings
1199:     Display::SetTheme(lvgl_theme);
1200: }
