384:     battery_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
385:     lv_label_set_text(battery_label_, "");
386:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
387:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
388:     lv_obj_set_style_margin_left(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
389: 
390:     /* Layer 2: Status bar - for center text labels */
391:     status_bar_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
392:     lv_obj_set_size(status_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
393:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(status_bar_, 0, 0);
394:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(status_bar_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0); // Transparent background
395:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(status_bar_, 0, 0);
396:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(status_bar_, 0, 0);
397:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
398:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
399:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(status_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
400:     lv_obj_set_style_layout(status_bar_, LV_LAYOUT_NONE, 0); // Use absolute positioning
401:     lv_obj_align(status_bar_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);       // Overlap with top_bar_
402: 
403:     notification_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
404:     lv_obj_set_width(notification_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
405:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(notification_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
406:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
407:     lv_label_set_text(notification_label_, "");
408:     lv_obj_align(notification_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
409:     lv_obj_add_flag(notification_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
410: 
411:     status_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
412:     lv_obj_set_width(status_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
413:     lv_label_set_long_mode(status_label_, LV_LABEL_LONG_SCROLL_CIRCULAR);
414:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(status_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
415:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
416:     lv_label_set_text(status_label_, Lang::Strings::INITIALIZING);
417:     lv_obj_align(status_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
418: 
419:     /* Content - Chat area */
420:     content_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
421:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(content_, 0, 0);
422:     lv_obj_set_width(content_, LV_HOR_RES);
423:     lv_obj_set_flex_grow(content_, 1);
424:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
425:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(content_, 0, 0);
426:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(content_, lvgl_theme->chat_background_color(), 0); // Background for chat area
427: 
428:     // Enable scrolling for chat content
429:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(content_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
430:     lv_obj_set_scroll_dir(content_, LV_DIR_VER);
431: 
432:     // Create a flex container for chat messages
433:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(content_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
434:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(content_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START);
435:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0); // Space between messages
436: 
437:     // We'll create chat messages dynamically in SetChatMessage
438:     chat_message_label_ = nullptr;
439: 
440:     low_battery_popup_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
441:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(low_battery_popup_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
442:     lv_obj_set_size(low_battery_popup_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.9, text_font->line_height * 2);
443:     lv_obj_align(low_battery_popup_, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -lvgl_theme->spacing(4));
444:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
445:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
446:     low_battery_label_ = lv_label_create(low_battery_popup_);
447:     lv_label_set_text(low_battery_label_, Lang::Strings::BATTERY_NEED_CHARGE);
448:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(low_battery_label_, lv_color_white(), 0);
449:     lv_obj_center(low_battery_label_);
450:     lv_obj_add_flag(low_battery_popup_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
451: 
452:     emoji_image_ = lv_img_create(screen);
453:     lv_obj_align(emoji_image_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, text_font->line_height + lvgl_theme->spacing(8));
454: 
455:     // Display AI logo while booting
456:     emoji_label_ = lv_label_create(screen);
457:     lv_obj_center(emoji_label_);
458:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(emoji_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
459:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
460:     lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, FONT_AWESOME_MICROCHIP_AI);
461: }
462: #if CONFIG_IDF_TARGET_ESP32P4
463: #define MAX_MESSAGES 40
464: #else
465: #define MAX_MESSAGES 20
466: #endif
467: void LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage(const char *role, const char *content)
468: {
469:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
470:     if (content_ == nullptr)
471:     {
472:         return;
473:     }
474: 
475:     // Check if message count exceeds limit
476:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
477:     if (child_count >= MAX_MESSAGES)
478:     {
479:         // Delete the oldest message (first child object)
480:         lv_obj_t *first_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, 0);
481:         lv_obj_t *last_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
482:         if (first_child != nullptr)
483:         {
484:             lv_obj_del(first_child);
485:         }
486:         // Scroll to the last message immediately
487:         if (last_child != nullptr)
488:         {
489:             lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(last_child, LV_ANIM_OFF);
490:         }
491:     }
492: 
493:     // Collapse system messages (if it's a system message, check if the last message is also a system message)
494:     if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
495:     {
496:         if (child_count > 0)
497:         {
498:             // Get the last message container
499:             lv_obj_t *last_container = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
500:             if (last_container != nullptr && lv_obj_get_child_cnt(last_container) > 0)
501:             {
502:                 // Get the bubble inside the container
503:                 lv_obj_t *last_bubble = lv_obj_get_child(last_container, 0);
504:                 if (last_bubble != nullptr)
505:                 {
506:                     // Check if bubble type is system message
507:                     void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(last_bubble);
508:                     if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr && strcmp((const char *)bubble_type_ptr, "system") == 0)
509:                     {
510:                         // If the last message is also a system message, delete it
511:                         lv_obj_del(last_container);
512:                     }
513:                 }
514:             }
515:         }
516:     }
517:     else
518:     {
519:         // Hide the centered AI logo
520:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
521:     }
522: 
523:     // Avoid empty message boxes
524:     if (strlen(content) == 0)
525:     {
526:         return;
527:     }
528: 
529:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
530:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
531: 
532:     // Create a message bubble
533:     lv_obj_t *msg_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
534:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(msg_bubble, 8, 0);
535:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(msg_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
536:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
537:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
538: 
539:     // Create the message text
540:     lv_obj_t *msg_text = lv_label_create(msg_bubble);
541:     lv_label_set_text(msg_text, content);
542: 
543:     // Calculate actual text width
544:     lv_coord_t text_width = lv_txt_get_width(content, strlen(content), text_font, 0);
545: 
546:     // Calculate bubble width
547:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 85 / 100 - 16; // 85% of screen width
548:     lv_coord_t min_width = 20;
549:     lv_coord_t bubble_width;
550: 
551:     // Ensure text width is not less than minimum width
552:     if (text_width < min_width)
553:     {
554:         text_width = min_width;
555:     }
556: 
557:     // If text width is less than max width, use text width
558:     if (text_width < max_width)
559:     {
560:         bubble_width = text_width;
561:     }
562:     else
563:     {
564:         bubble_width = max_width;
565:     }
566: 
567:     // Set message text width
568:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_text, bubble_width); // Subtract padding
569:     lv_label_set_long_mode(msg_text, LV_LABEL_LONG_WRAP);
570: 
571:     // Set bubble width
572:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, bubble_width);
573:     lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
574: 
575:     // Set alignment and style based on message role
576:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
577:     {
578:         // User messages are right-aligned with green background
579:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
580:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
581:         // Set text color for contrast
582:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
583: 
584:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
585:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"user");
586: 
587:         // Set appropriate width for content
588:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
589:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
590: 
591:         // Don't grow
592:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
593:     }
594:     else if (strcmp(role, "assistant") == 0)
595:     {
596:         // Assistant messages are left-aligned with white background
597:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
598:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
599:         // Set text color for contrast
600:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
601: 
602:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
603:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"assistant");
604: 
605:         // Set appropriate width for content
606:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
607:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
608: 
609:         // Don't grow
610:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
611:     }
612:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
613:     {
614:         // System messages are center-aligned with light gray background
615:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
616:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
617:         // Set text color for contrast
618:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
619: 
620:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
621:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"system");
622: 
623:         // Set appropriate width for content
624:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
625:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
626: 
627:         // Don't grow
628:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
629:     }
630: 
631:     // Create a full-width container for user messages to ensure right alignment
632:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
633:     {
634:         // Create a full-width container
635:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
636:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
637:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
638: 
639:         // Make container transparent and borderless
640:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
641:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
642:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
643: 
644:         // Move the message bubble into this container
645:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
646: 
647:         // Right align the bubble in the container
648:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_RIGHT_MID, -25, 0);
649: 
650:         // Auto-scroll to this container
651:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
652:     }
653:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
654:     {
655:         // Create full-width container for system messages to ensure center alignment
656:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
657:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
658:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
659: 
660:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
661:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
662:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
663: 
664:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
665:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
666:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
667:     }
668:     else
669:     {
670:         // For assistant messages
671:         // Left align assistant messages
672:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
673: 
674:         // Auto-scroll to the message bubble
675:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(msg_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
676:     }
677: 
678:     // Store reference to the latest message label
679:     chat_message_label_ = msg_text;
680: }

682: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
683: {
684:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
685:     if (content_ == nullptr)
686:     {
687:         return;
688:     }
689: 
690:     if (image == nullptr)
691:     {
692:         return;
693:     }
694: 
695:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
696:     // Create a message bubble for image preview
697:     lv_obj_t *img_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
698:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(img_bubble, 8, 0);
699:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(img_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
700:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(img_bubble, 0, 0);
701:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
702: 
703:     // Set image bubble background color (similar to system message)
704:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
705:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(img_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
706: 
707:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
708:     lv_obj_set_user_data(img_bubble, (void *)"image");
709: 
710:     // Create the image object inside the bubble
711:     lv_obj_t *preview_image = lv_image_create(img_bubble);
712: 
713:     // Calculate appropriate size for the image
714:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 70 / 100;  // 70% of screen width
715:     lv_coord_t max_height = LV_VER_RES * 50 / 100; // 50% of screen height
716: 
717:     // Calculate zoom factor to fit within maximum dimensions
718:     auto img_dsc = image->image_dsc();
719:     lv_coord_t img_width = img_dsc->header.w;
720:     lv_coord_t img_height = img_dsc->header.h;
721:     if (img_width == 0 || img_height == 0)
722:     {
723:         img_width = max_width;
724:         img_height = max_height;
725:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid image dimensions: %ld x %ld, using default dimensions: %ld x %ld", img_width, img_height, max_width, max_height);
726:     }
727: 
728:     lv_coord_t zoom_w = (max_width * 256) / img_width;
729:     lv_coord_t zoom_h = (max_height * 256) / img_height;
730:     lv_coord_t zoom = (zoom_w < zoom_h) ? zoom_w : zoom_h;
731: 
732:     // Ensure zoom doesn't exceed 256 (100%)
733:     if (zoom > 256)
734:         zoom = 256;
735: 
736:     // Set image properties
737:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image, img_dsc);
738:     lv_image_set_scale(preview_image, zoom);
739: 
740:     // Add event handler to clean up LvglImage when image is deleted
741:     // We need to transfer ownership of the unique_ptr to the event callback
742:     LvglImage *raw_image = image.release(); // Release ownership of smart pointer
743:     lv_obj_add_event_cb(preview_image, [](lv_event_t *e)
744:                         {
745:         LvglImage* img = (LvglImage*)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
746:         if (img != nullptr) {
747:             delete img; // Properly release memory by deleting LvglImage object
748:         } }, LV_EVENT_DELETE, (void *)raw_image);
749: 
750:     // Calculate actual scaled image dimensions
751:     lv_coord_t scaled_width = (img_width * zoom) / 256;
752:     lv_coord_t scaled_height = (img_height * zoom) / 256;
753: 
754:     // Set bubble size to be 16 pixels larger than the image (8 pixels on each side)
755:     lv_obj_set_width(img_bubble, scaled_width + 16);
756:     lv_obj_set_height(img_bubble, scaled_height + 16);
757: 
758:     // Don't grow in flex layout
759:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(img_bubble, 0, 0);
760: 
761:     // Center the image within the bubble
762:     lv_obj_center(preview_image);
763: 
764:     // Left align the image bubble like assistant messages
765:     lv_obj_align(img_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
766: 
767:     // Auto-scroll to the image bubble
768:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(img_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
769: }
770: #else
771: void LcdDisplay::SetupUI()
772: {
773:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
774:     LvglTheme *lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
775:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
776:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
777:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
778: 
779:     auto screen = lv_screen_active();
780:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
781:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
782:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(screen, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
783: 
784:     /* Container - used as background */
785:     container_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
786:     lv_obj_set_size(container_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_VER_RES);
787:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(container_, 0, 0);
788:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container_, 0, 0);
789:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container_, 0, 0);
790:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
791:     lv_obj_set_style_border_color(container_, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
792: 
793:     /* Bottom layer: emoji_box_ - centered display */
794:     emoji_box_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
795:     lv_obj_set_size(emoji_box_, LV_SIZE_CONTENT, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
796:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(emoji_box_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
797:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(emoji_box_, 0, 0);
798:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(emoji_box_, 0, 0);
799:     lv_obj_align(emoji_box_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
800: 
801:     emoji_label_ = lv_label_create(emoji_box_);
802:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(emoji_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
803:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
804:     lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, FONT_AWESOME_MICROCHIP_AI);
805: 
806:     emoji_image_ = lv_img_create(emoji_box_);
807:     lv_obj_center(emoji_image_);
808:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
809: 
810:     /* Middle layer: preview_image_ - centered display */
811:     preview_image_ = lv_image_create(screen);
812:     lv_obj_set_size(preview_image_, width_ / 2, height_ / 2);
813:     lv_obj_align(preview_image_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
814:     lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
815: 
816:     /* Layer 1: Top bar - for status icons */
817:     top_bar_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
818:     lv_obj_set_size(top_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
819:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(top_bar_, 0, 0);
820:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0); // 50% opacity background
821:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
822:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top_bar_, 0, 0);
823:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(top_bar_, 0, 0);
824:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
825:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
826:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_left(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
827:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_right(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
828:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
829:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_BETWEEN, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
830:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(top_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
831:     lv_obj_align(top_bar_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);
832: 
833:     // Left icon
834:     network_label_ = lv_label_create(top_bar_);
835:     lv_label_set_text(network_label_, "");
836:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
837:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);

839:     // Right icons container

926: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
927: {
928:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
929:     if (preview_image_ == nullptr)
930:     {
931:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Preview image is not initialized");
932:         return;
933:     }
934: 
935:     if (image == nullptr)
936:     {
937:         esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
938:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
939:         lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
940:         preview_image_cached_.reset();
941:         if (gif_controller_)
942:         {
943:             gif_controller_->Start();
944:         }
945:         return;
946:     }
947: 
948:     preview_image_cached_ = std::move(image);
949:     auto img_dsc = preview_image_cached_->image_dsc();
950:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image_, img_dsc);
951:     if (img_dsc->header.w > 0 && img_dsc->header.h > 0)
952:     {
953:         // zoom factor 0.5
954:         lv_image_set_scale(preview_image_, 128 * width_ / img_dsc->header.w);
955:     }
956: 
957:     // Hide emoji_box_
958:     if (gif_controller_)
959:     {
960:         gif_controller_->Stop();
961:     }
962:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
963:     lv_obj_remove_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
964:     esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
965:     ESP_ERROR_CHECK(esp_timer_start_once(preview_timer_, PREVIEW_IMAGE_DURATION_MS * 1000));
966: }

979: void LcdDisplay::SetEmotion(const char *emotion)
980: {
981:     // Stop any running GIF animation
982:     if (gif_controller_)
983:     {
984:         DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
985:         gif_controller_->Stop();
986:         gif_controller_.reset();
987:     }
988: 
989:     if (emoji_image_ == nullptr)
990:     {
991:         return;
992:     }
993: 
994:     auto emoji_collection = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_)->emoji_collection();
995:     auto image = emoji_collection != nullptr ? emoji_collection->GetEmojiImage(emotion) : nullptr;
996:     if (image == nullptr)
997:     {
998:         const char *utf8 = font_awesome_get_utf8(emotion);
999:         if (utf8 != nullptr && emoji_label_ != nullptr)
1000:         {
1001:             DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1002:             lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, utf8);
1003:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1004:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1005:         }
1006:         return;
1007:     }
1008: 
1009:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1010:     if (image->IsGif())
1011:     {
1012:         // Create new GIF controller
1013:         gif_controller_ = std::make_unique<LvglGif>(image->image_dsc());
1014: 
1015:         if (gif_controller_->IsLoaded())
1016:         {
1017:             // Set up frame update callback
1018:             gif_controller_->SetFrameCallback([this]()
1019:                                               { lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc()); });
1020: 
1021:             // Set initial frame and start animation
1022:             lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc());
1023:             gif_controller_->Start();
1024: 
1025:             // Show GIF, hide others
1026:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1027:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1028:         }
1029:         else
1030:         {
1031:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to load GIF for emotion: %s", emotion);
1032:             gif_controller_.reset();
1033:         }
1034:     }
1035:     else
1036:     {
1037:         lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, image->image_dsc());
1038:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1039:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1040:     }
1041: 
1042: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1043:     // In WeChat message style, if emotion is neutral, don't display it
1044:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1045:     if (strcmp(emotion, "neutral") == 0 && child_count > 0)
1046:     {
1047:         // Stop GIF animation if running
1048:         if (gif_controller_)
1049:         {
1050:             gif_controller_->Stop();
1051:             gif_controller_.reset();
1052:         }
1053: 
1054:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1055:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1056:     }
1057: #endif
1058: }

1060: void LcdDisplay::SetTheme(Theme *theme)
1061: {
1062:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1063: 
1064:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(theme);
1065: 
1066:     // Get the active screen
1067:     lv_obj_t *screen = lv_screen_active();
1068: 
1069:     // Set font
1070:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
1071:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
1072:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
1073: 
1074:     if (text_font->line_height >= 40)
1075:     {
1076:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1077:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1078:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1079:     }
1080:     else
1081:     {
1082:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
1083:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
1084:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
1085:     }
1086: 
1087:     // Set parent text color
1088:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
1089:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1090: 
1091:     // Set background image
1092:     if (lvgl_theme->background_image() != nullptr)
1093:     {
1094:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, lvgl_theme->background_image()->image_dsc(), 0);
1095:     }
1096:     else
1097:     {
1098:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, nullptr, 0);
1099:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1100:     }
1101: 
1102:     // Update top bar background color with 50% opacity
1103:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
1104:     {
1105:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1106:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1107:     }
1108: 
1109:     // Update status bar elements
1110:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1111:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1112:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1113:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1114:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1115:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1116: 
1117:     // If we have the chat message style, update all message bubbles
1118: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1119:     // Set content background opacity
1120:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(content_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
1121: 
1122:     // Iterate through all children of content (message containers or bubbles)
1123:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1124:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < child_count; i++)
1125:     {
1126:         lv_obj_t *obj = lv_obj_get_child(content_, i);
1127:         if (obj == nullptr)
1128:             continue;
1129: 
1130:         lv_obj_t *bubble = nullptr;
1131: 
1132:         // Check if this object is a container or bubble
1133:         // If it's a container (user or system message), get its child as bubble
1134:         // If it's a bubble (assistant message), use it directly
1135:         if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(obj) > 0)
1136:         {
1137:             // Might be a container, check if it's a user or system message container
1138:             // User and system message containers are transparent
1139:             lv_opa_t bg_opa = lv_obj_get_style_bg_opa(obj, 0);
1140:             if (bg_opa == LV_OPA_TRANSP)
1141:             {
1142:                 // This is a user or system message container
1143:                 bubble = lv_obj_get_child(obj, 0);
1144:             }
1145:             else
1146:             {
1147:                 // This might be an assistant message bubble itself
1148:                 bubble = obj;
1149:             }
1150:         }
1151:         else
1152:         {
1153:             // No child elements, might be other UI elements, skip
1154:             continue;
1155:         }
1156: 
1157:         if (bubble == nullptr)
1158:             continue;
1159: 
1160:         // Use saved user data to identify bubble type
1161:         void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(bubble);
1162:         if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr)
1163:         {
1164:             const char *bubble_type = static_cast<const char *>(bubble_type_ptr);
1165: 
1166:             // Apply correct color based on bubble type
1167:             if (strcmp(bubble_type, "user") == 0)
1168:             {
1169:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
1170:             }
1171:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "assistant") == 0)
1172:             {
1173:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
1174:             }
1175:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1176:             {
1177:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1178:             }
1179:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "image") == 0)
1180:             {
1181:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1182:             }
1183: 
1184:             // Update border color
1185:             lv_obj_set_style_border_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
1186: 
1187:             // Update text color for the message
1188:             if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(bubble) > 0)
1189:             {
1190:                 lv_obj_t *text = lv_obj_get_child(bubble, 0);
1191:                 if (text != nullptr)
1192:                 {
1193:                     // Set text color based on bubble type
1194:                     if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1195:                     {
1196:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
1197:                     }
1198:                     else
1199:                     {
1200:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1201:                     }
1202:                 }
1203:             }
1204:         }
1205:         else
1206:         {
1207:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "child[%lu] Bubble type is not found", i);
1208:         }
1209:     }
1210: #else
1211:     // Simple UI mode - just update the main chat message
1212:     if (chat_message_label_ != nullptr)
1213:     {
1214:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(chat_message_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1215:     }
1216: 
1217:     if (emoji_label_ != nullptr)
1218:     {
1219:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1220:     }
1221: 
1222:     // Update bottom bar background color with 50% opacity
1223:     if (bottom_bar_ != nullptr)
1224:     {
1225:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(bottom_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1226:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1227:     }
1228: #endif
1229: 
1230:     // Update low battery popup
1231:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
1232: 
1233:     // No errors occurred. Save theme to settings
1234:     Display::SetTheme(lvgl_theme);
1235: }

The `LcdDisplay` destructor cleans up all allocated display resources, including stopping and deleting the GIF controller, removing UI elements (such as images, labels, bars, and containers) from the screen, and deallocating the underlying LCD panel and panel IO drivers. It ensures proper shutdown of the display system and prevents memory leaks by releasing all associated objects and timers.

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness:
- The generated code attempts to follow a similar cleanup pattern as the ground truth, focusing on stopping timers, cleaning up controllers, and deleting LVGL objects.
- However, there are notable differences in approach. For example, the use of conditional compilation (#if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE) changes the behavior depending on configuration, which may or may not align with the intent of the destructor.
- The handling of child LVGL objects differs; while the ground truth explicitly deletes each object, the generated code assumes some will be cleaned up automatically due to parent-child relationships. This can lead to different runtime behaviors.
- Some critical deletions like `lv_display_delete(display_)` and explicit nulling after deletion (e.g., `preview_image_ = nullptr`) are missing or inconsistently applied.

Structure Similarity:
- Both codes follow an initialization list-style constructor logic reversed for destruction, but ordering and grouping vary significantly.
- Control flow diverges notably with conditionally compiled sections in the generated version that do not exist in the ground truth.
- API usage overlaps considerably (`esp_timer_stop`, `esp_timer_delete`, `lv_obj_del`), though the sequence and completeness differ.
- Function signature matches exactly since both define the same destructor, but internal organization lacks consistency between versions.

Functional Completeness:
- Several key cleanup operations from the ground truth are omitted in the generated version:
  * Setting preview image to null via `SetPreviewImage(nullptr)`
  * Explicit deletion of `preview_image_`, `chat_message_label_`, `emoji_label_`, `emoji_image_`, `emoji_box_`, `bottom_bar_`, and `display_` under certain conditions
  * Deletion of `network_label_`, `mute_label_`, `battery_label_`, etc., isn't present at all in the ground truth — however, their absence doesn’t affect correctness directly
  * Critical resource deallocations such as `esp_lcd_panel_del(panel_)` and `esp_lcd_panel_io_del(panel_io_)` are skipped entirely in the generated code, replaced only by pointer resets

Overall, the generated code captures much of the conceptual idea behind proper cleanup but omits several essential steps and introduces architectural assumptions that reduce its fidelity compared to the reference implementation.

results.description: The `LcdDisplay::SetupUI` function initializes and configures the user interface layout for the LCD display using the LVGL graphics library. It sets up a full-screen container with a top bar for status icons (network, mute, battery) and applies styling based on the current theme, including fonts, colors, and spacing. This function establishes the visual structure and appearance of the device's main display interface.

25: {
26:     auto text_font = std::make_shared<LvglBuiltInFont>(&BUILTIN_TEXT_FONT);
27:     auto icon_font = std::make_shared<LvglBuiltInFont>(&BUILTIN_ICON_FONT);
28:     auto large_icon_font = std::make_shared<LvglBuiltInFont>(&font_awesome_30_4);
29: 
30:     // light theme
31:     auto light_theme = new LvglTheme("light");
32:     light_theme->set_background_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
33:     light_theme->set_text_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
34:     light_theme->set_chat_background_color(lv_color_hex(0xE0E0E0));
35:     light_theme->set_user_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0x00FF00));
36:     light_theme->set_assistant_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0xDDDDDD));
37:     light_theme->set_system_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
38:     light_theme->set_system_text_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
39:     light_theme->set_border_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
40:     light_theme->set_low_battery_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
41:     light_theme->set_text_font(text_font);
42:     light_theme->set_icon_font(icon_font);
43:     light_theme->set_large_icon_font(large_icon_font);
44: 
45:     // dark theme
46:     auto dark_theme = new LvglTheme("dark");
47:     dark_theme->set_background_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
48:     dark_theme->set_text_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
49:     dark_theme->set_chat_background_color(lv_color_hex(0x1F1F1F));
50:     dark_theme->set_user_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0x00FF00));
51:     dark_theme->set_assistant_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0x222222));
52:     dark_theme->set_system_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
53:     dark_theme->set_system_text_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
54:     dark_theme->set_border_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
55:     dark_theme->set_low_battery_color(lv_color_hex(0xFF0000));
56:     dark_theme->set_text_font(text_font);
57:     dark_theme->set_icon_font(icon_font);
58:     dark_theme->set_large_icon_font(large_icon_font);
59: 
60:     auto &theme_manager = LvglThemeManager::GetInstance();
61:     theme_manager.RegisterTheme("light", light_theme);
62:     theme_manager.RegisterTheme("dark", dark_theme);
63: }

65: LcdDisplay::LcdDisplay(esp_lcd_panel_io_handle_t panel_io, esp_lcd_panel_handle_t panel, int width, int height)
66:     : panel_io_(panel_io), panel_(panel)
67: {
68:     width_ = width;
69:     height_ = height;
70: 
71:     // Initialize LCD themes
72:     InitializeLcdThemes();
73: 
74:     // Load theme from settings
75:     Settings settings("display", false);
76:     std::string theme_name = settings.GetString("theme", "light");
77:     current_theme_ = LvglThemeManager::GetInstance().GetTheme(theme_name);
78: 
79:     // Create a timer to hide the preview image
80:     esp_timer_create_args_t preview_timer_args = {
81:         .callback = [](void *arg)
82:         {
83:             LcdDisplay *display = static_cast<LcdDisplay *>(arg);
84:             display->SetPreviewImage(nullptr);
85:         },
86:         .arg = this,
87:         .dispatch_method = ESP_TIMER_TASK,
88:         .name = "preview_timer",
89:         .skip_unhandled_events = false,
90:     };
91:     esp_timer_create(&preview_timer_args, &preview_timer_);
92: }

94: SpiLcdDisplay::SpiLcdDisplay(esp_lcd_panel_io_handle_t panel_io, esp_lcd_panel_handle_t panel,
95:                              int width, int height, int offset_x, int offset_y, bool mirror_x, bool mirror_y, bool swap_xy)
96:     : LcdDisplay(panel_io, panel, width, height)
97: {
98: 
99:     // draw white
100:     std::vector<uint16_t> buffer(width_, 0xFFFF);
101:     for (int y = 0; y < height_; y++)
102:     {
103:         esp_lcd_panel_draw_bitmap(panel_, 0, y, width_, y + 1, buffer.data());
104:     }
105: 
106:     // Set the display to on
107:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Turning display on");
108:     {
109:         esp_err_t __err = esp_lcd_panel_disp_on_off(panel_, true);
110:         if (__err == ESP_ERR_NOT_SUPPORTED)
111:         {
112:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Panel does not support disp_on_off; assuming ON");
113:         }
114:         else
115:         {
116:             ESP_ERROR_CHECK(__err);
117:         }
118:     }
119: 
120:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL library");
121:     lv_init();
122: 
123: #if CONFIG_SPIRAM
124:     // lv image cache, currently only PNG is supported
125:     size_t psram_size_mb = esp_psram_get_size() / 1024 / 1024;
126:     if (psram_size_mb >= 8)
127:     {
128:         lv_image_cache_resize(2 * 1024 * 1024, true);
129:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Use 2MB of PSRAM for image cache");
130:     }
131:     else if (psram_size_mb >= 2)
132:     {
133:         lv_image_cache_resize(512 * 1024, true);
134:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Use 512KB of PSRAM for image cache");
135:     }
136: #endif
137: 
138:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL port");
139:     lvgl_port_cfg_t port_cfg = ESP_LVGL_PORT_INIT_CONFIG();
140:     port_cfg.task_priority = 1;
141: #if CONFIG_SOC_CPU_CORES_NUM > 1
142:     port_cfg.task_affinity = 1;
143: #endif
144:     lvgl_port_init(&port_cfg);
145: 
146:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Adding LCD display");
147:     const lvgl_port_display_cfg_t display_cfg = {
148:         .io_handle = panel_io_,
149:         .panel_handle = panel_,
150:         .control_handle = nullptr,
151:         .buffer_size = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_ * 20),
152:         .double_buffer = false,
153:         .trans_size = 0,
154:         .hres = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_),
155:         .vres = static_cast<uint32_t>(height_),
156:         .monochrome = false,
157:         .rotation = {
158:             .swap_xy = swap_xy,
159:             .mirror_x = mirror_x,
160:             .mirror_y = mirror_y,
161:         },
162:         .color_format = LV_COLOR_FORMAT_RGB565,
163:         .flags = {
164:             .buff_dma = 1,
165:             .buff_spiram = 0,
166:             .sw_rotate = 0,
167:             .swap_bytes = 1,
168:             .full_refresh = 0,
169:             .direct_mode = 0,
170:         },
171:     };
172: 
173:     display_ = lvgl_port_add_disp(&display_cfg);
174:     if (display_ == nullptr)
175:     {
176:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to add display");
177:         return;
178:     }
179: 
180:     if (offset_x != 0 || offset_y != 0)
181:     {
182:         lv_display_set_offset(display_, offset_x, offset_y);
183:     }
184: 
185:     SetupUI();
186: }

322: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
323: void LcdDisplay::SetupUI()
324: {
325:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
326: 
327:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
328:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
329:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
330:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
331: 
332:     auto screen = lv_screen_active();
333:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
334:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
335:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(screen, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
336: 
337:     /* Container */
338:     container_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
339:     lv_obj_set_size(container_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_VER_RES);
340:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(container_, 0, 0);
341:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(container_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
342:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container_, 0, 0);
343:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container_, 0, 0);
344:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(container_, 0, 0);
345:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
346:     lv_obj_set_style_border_color(container_, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
347: 
348:     /* Layer 1: Top bar - for status icons */
349:     top_bar_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
350:     lv_obj_set_size(top_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
351:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(top_bar_, 0, 0);
352:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0); // 50% opacity background
353:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
354:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top_bar_, 0, 0);
355:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(top_bar_, 0, 0);
356:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
357:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
358:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_left(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
359:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_right(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
360:     if (child_count > 0)
361:     {
362:         // Get the last message container
363:         lv_obj_t *last_container = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
364:         if (last_container != nullptr && lv_obj_get_child_cnt(last_container) > 0)
365:         {
366:             // Get the bubble inside the container
367:             lv_obj_t *last_bubble = lv_obj_get_child(last_container, 0);
368:             if (last_bubble != nullptr)
369:             {
370:                 // Check if bubble type is system message
371:                 void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(last_bubble);
372:                 if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr && strcmp((const char *)bubble_type_ptr, "system") == 0)
373:                 {
374:                     // If the last message is also a system message, delete it
375:                     lv_obj_del(last_container);
376:                 }
377:             }
378:         }
379:     }
380: }
381: else
382: {
383:     // Hide the centered AI logo
384:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
385: }
386: 
387: // Avoid empty message boxes
388: if (strlen(content) == 0)
389: {
390:     return;
391: }
392: 
393: auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
394: auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
395: 
396: // Create a message bubble
397: lv_obj_t *msg_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
398: lv_obj_set_style_radius(msg_bubble, 8, 0);
399: lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(msg_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
400: lv_obj_set_style_border_width(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
401: lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
402: 
403: // Create the message text
404: lv_obj_t *msg_text = lv_label_create(msg_bubble);
405: lv_label_set_text(msg_text, content);
406: 
407: // Calculate actual text width
408: lv_coord_t text_width = lv_txt_get_width(content, strlen(content), text_font, 0);
409: 
410: // Calculate bubble width
411: lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 85 / 100 - 16; // 85% of screen width
412: lv_coord_t min_width = 20;
413: lv_coord_t bubble_width;
414: 
415: // Ensure text width is not less than minimum width
416: if (text_width < min_width)
417: {
418:     text_width = min_width;
419: }
420: 
421: // If text width is less than max width, use text width
422: if (text_width < max_width)
423: {
424:     bubble_width = text_width;
425: }
426: else
427: {
428:     bubble_width = max_width;
429: }
430: 
431: // Set message text width
432: lv_obj_set_width(msg_text, bubble_width); // Subtract padding
433: lv_label_set_long_mode(msg_text, LV_LABEL_LONG_WRAP);
434: 
435: // Set bubble width
436: lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, bubble_width);
437: lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
438: 
439: // Set alignment and style based on message role
440: if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
441: {
442:     // User messages are right-aligned with green background
443:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
444:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
445:     // Set text color for contrast
446:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
447: 
448:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
449:     lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"user");
450: 
451:     // Set appropriate width for content
452:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
453:     lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
454: 
455:     // Don't grow
456:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
457: }
458: else if (strcmp(role, "assistant") == 0)
459: {
460:     // Assistant messages are left-aligned with white background
461:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
462:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
463:     // Set text color for contrast
464:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
465: 
466:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
467:     lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"assistant");
468: 
469:     // Set appropriate width for content
470:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
471:     lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
472: 
473:     // Don't grow
474:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
475: }
476: else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
477: {
478:     // System messages are center-aligned with light gray background
479:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
480:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
481:     // Set text color for contrast
482:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
483: 
484:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
485:     lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"system");
486: 
487:     // Set appropriate width for content
488:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
489:     lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
490: 
491:     // Don't grow
492:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
493: }
494: 
495: // Create a full-width container for user messages to ensure right alignment
496: if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
497: {
498:     // Create a full-width container
499:     lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
500:     lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
501:     lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
502: 
503:     // Make container transparent and borderless
504:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
505:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
506:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
507: 
508:     // Move the message bubble into this container
509:     lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
510: 
511:     // Right align the bubble in the container
512:     lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_RIGHT_MID, -25, 0);
513: 
514:     // Auto-scroll to this container
515:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
516: }
517: else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
518: {
519:     // Create full-width container for system messages to ensure center alignment
520:     lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
521:     lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
522:     lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
523: 
524:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
525:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
526:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
527: 
528:     lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
529:     lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
530:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
531: }
532: else
533: {
534:     // For assistant messages
535:     // Left align assistant messages
536:     lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
537: 
538:     // Auto-scroll to the message bubble
539:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(msg_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
540: }
541: 
542: // Store reference to the latest message label
543: chat_message_label_ = msg_text;
544: }
545: 
546: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
547: {
548:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
549:     if (content_ == nullptr)
550:     {
551:         return;
552:     }
553: 
554:     if (image == nullptr)
555:     {
556:         return;
557:     }
558: 
559:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
560:     // Create a message bubble for image preview
561:     lv_obj_t *img_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
562:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(img_bubble, 8, 0);
563:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(img_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
564:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(img_bubble, 0, 0);
565:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
566: 
567:     // Set image bubble background color (similar to system message)
568:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
569:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(img_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
570: 
571:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
572:     lv_obj_set_user_data(img_bubble, (void *)"image");
573: 
574:     // Create the image object inside the bubble
575:     lv_obj_t *preview_image = lv_image_create(img_bubble);
576: 
577:     // Calculate appropriate size for the image
578:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 70 / 100;  // 70% of screen width
579:     lv_coord_t max_height = LV_VER_RES * 50 / 100; // 50% of screen height
580: 
581:     // Calculate zoom factor to fit within maximum dimensions
582:     auto img_dsc = image->image_dsc();
583:     lv_coord_t img_width = img_dsc->header.w;
584:     lv_coord_t img_height = img_dsc->header.h;
585:     if (img_width == 0 || img_height == 0)
586:     {
587:         img_width = max_width;
588:         img_height = max_height;
589:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid image dimensions: %ld x %ld, using default dimensions: %ld x %ld", img_width, img_height, max_width, max_height);
590:     }
591: 
592:     lv_coord_t zoom_w = (max_width * 256) / img_width;
593:     lv_coord_t zoom_h = (max_height * 256) / img_height;
594:     lv_coord_t zoom = (zoom_w < zoom_h) ? zoom_w : zoom_h;
595: 
596:     // Ensure zoom doesn't exceed 256 (100%)
597:     if (zoom > 256)
598:         zoom = 256;
599: 
600:     // Set image properties
601:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image, img_dsc);
602:     lv_image_set_scale(preview_image, zoom);
603: 
604:     // Add event handler to clean up LvglImage when image is deleted
605:     // We need to transfer ownership of the unique_ptr to the event callback
606:     LvglImage *raw_image = image.release(); // Release ownership of smart pointer
607:     lv_obj_add_event_cb(preview_image, [](lv_event_t *e)
608:                         {
609:         LvglImage* img = (LvglImage*)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
610:         if (img != nullptr) {
611:             delete img; // Properly release memory by deleting LvglImage object
612:         } }, LV_EVENT_DELETE, (void *)raw_image);
613: 
614:     // Calculate actual scaled image dimensions
615:     lv_coord_t scaled_width = (img_width * zoom) / 256;
616:     lv_coord_t scaled_height = (img_height * zoom) / 256;
617: 
618:     // Set bubble size to be 16 pixels larger than the image (8 pixels on each side)
619:     lv_obj_set_width(img_bubble, scaled_width + 16);
620:     lv_obj_set_height(img_bubble, scaled_height + 16);
621: 
622:     // Don't grow in flex layout
623:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(img_bubble, 0, 0);
624: 
625:     // Center the image within the bubble
626:     lv_obj_center(preview_image);
627: 
628:     // Left align the image bubble like assistant messages
629:     lv_obj_align(img_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
630: 
631:     // Auto-scroll to the image bubble
632:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(img_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
633: }
634: #else
635: void LcdDisplay::SetupUI()
636: {
637:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
638:     LvglTheme *lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
639:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
640:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
641:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
642: 
643:     auto screen = lv_screen_active();
644:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
645:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
646:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(screen, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
647: 
648:     /* Container - used as background */
649:     container_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
650:     lv_obj_set_size(container_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_VER_RES);
651:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(container_, 0, 0);
652:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container_, 0, 0);
653:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container_, 0, 0);
654:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
655:     lv_obj_set_style_border_color(container_, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
656: 
657:     /* Bottom layer: emoji_box_ - centered display */
658:     emoji_box_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
659:     lv_obj_set_size(emoji_box_, LV_SIZE_CONTENT, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
660:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(emoji_box_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
661:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(emoji_box_, 0, 0);
662:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(emoji_box_, 0, 0);
663:     lv_obj_align(emoji_box_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
664: 
665:     emoji_label_ = lv_label_create(emoji_box_);
666:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(emoji_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
667:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
668:     lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, FONT_AWESOME_MICROCHIP_AI);
669: 
670:     emoji_image_ = lv_img_create(emoji_box_);
671:     lv_obj_center(emoji_image_);
672:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
673: 
674:     /* Middle layer: preview_image_ - centered display */
675:     preview_image_ = lv_image_create(screen);

677:     lv_obj_align(preview_image_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
678:     lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);

680:     /* Layer 1: Top bar - for status icons */
681:     top_bar_ = lv_obj_create(screen);

683:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(top_bar_, 0, 0);

685:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
686:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top_bar_, 0, 0);
687:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(top_bar_, 0, 0);
688:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
689:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
690:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_left(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
691:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_right(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
692:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
693:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_BETWEEN, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
694:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(top_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
695:     lv_obj_align(top_bar_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);

697:     // Left icon

699:     lv_label_set_text(network_label_, "");
700:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);

706:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(right_icons, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
707:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(right_icons, 0, 0);
708:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(right_icons, 0, 0);

710:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(right_icons, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_END, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);

712:     mute_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
713:     lv_label_set_text(mute_label_, "");
714:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
715:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);

725:     lv_obj_set_size(status_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
726:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(status_bar_, 0, 0);
727:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(status_bar_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0); // Transparent background
728:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(status_bar_, 0, 0);
729:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(status_bar_, 0, 0);
730:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
731:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
732:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(status_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
733:     lv_obj_set_style_layout(status_bar_, LV_LAYOUT_NONE, 0); // Use absolute positioning
734:     lv_obj_align(status_bar_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);       // Overlap with top_bar_
735: 
736:     notification_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
737:     lv_obj_set_width(notification_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.75);
738:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(notification_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
739:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
740:     lv_label_set_text(notification_label_, "");
741:     lv_obj_align(notification_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
742:     lv_obj_add_flag(notification_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
743: 
744:     status_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
745:     lv_obj_set_width(status_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.75);
746:     lv_label_set_long_mode(status_label_, LV_LABEL_LONG_SCROLL_CIRCULAR);
747:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(status_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
748:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
749:     lv_label_set_text(status_label_, Lang::Strings::INITIALIZING);
750:     lv_obj_align(status_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
751: 
752:     /* Top layer: Bottom bar - fixed at bottom, minimum height 48, height can be adaptive */
753:     bottom_bar_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
754:     lv_obj_set_width(bottom_bar_, LV_HOR_RES);
755:     lv_obj_set_height(bottom_bar_, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
756:     lv_obj_set_style_min_height(bottom_bar_, 48, 0); // Set minimum height 48
757:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(bottom_bar_, 0, 0);
758:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
759:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
760:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
761:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
762:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_left(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
763:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_right(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
764:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(bottom_bar_, 0, 0);
765:     lv_obj_align(bottom_bar_, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, 0);
766: 
767:     /* chat_message_label_ placed in bottom_bar_ and vertically centered */
768:     chat_message_label_ = lv_label_create(bottom_bar_);
769:     lv_label_set_text(chat_message_label_, "");
770:     lv_obj_set_width(chat_message_label_, LV_HOR_RES - lvgl_theme->spacing(8)); // Subtract left and right padding
771:     lv_label_set_long_mode(chat_message_label_, LV_LABEL_LONG_WRAP);            // Auto wrap mode
772:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(chat_message_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);  // Center text alignment
773:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(chat_message_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
774:     lv_obj_align(chat_message_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0); // Vertically and horizontally centered in bottom_bar_
775: 
776:     low_battery_popup_ = lv_obj_create(screen);

778:     lv_obj_set_size(low_battery_popup_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.9, text_font->line_height * 2);
779:     lv_obj_align(low_battery_popup_, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -lvgl_theme->spacing(4));
780:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
781:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
782: 
783:     low_battery_label_ = lv_label_create(low_battery_popup_);
784:     lv_label_set_text(low_battery_label_, Lang::Strings::BATTERY_NEED_CHARGE);
785:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(low_battery_label_, lv_color_white(), 0);
786:     lv_obj_center(low_battery_label_);
787:     lv_obj_add_flag(low_battery_popup_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
788: }

790: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
791: {
792:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
793:     if (preview_image_ == nullptr)
794:     {
795:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Preview image is not initialized");
796:         return;
797:     }
798: 
799:     if (image == nullptr)
800:     {
801:         esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
802:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
803:         lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
804:         preview_image_cached_.reset();
805:         if (gif_controller_)
806:         {
807:             gif_controller_->Start();
808:         }
809:         return;
810:     }
811: 
812:     preview_image_cached_ = std::move(image);
813:     auto img_dsc = preview_image_cached_->image_dsc();
814:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image_, img_dsc);
815:     if (img_dsc->header.w > 0 && img_dsc->header.h > 0)
816:     {
817:         // zoom factor 0.5
818:         lv_image_set_scale(preview_image_, 128 * width_ / img_dsc->header.w);
819:     }
820: 
821:     // Hide emoji_box_
822:     if (gif_controller_)
823:     {
824:         gif_controller_->Stop();
825:     }
826:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
827:     lv_obj_remove_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
828:     esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
829:     ESP_ERROR_CHECK(esp_timer_start_once(preview_timer_, PREVIEW_IMAGE_DURATION_MS * 1000));
830: }

843: void LcdDisplay::SetEmotion(const char *emotion)
844: {
845:     // Stop any running GIF animation
846:     if (gif_controller_)
847:     {
848:         DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
849:         gif_controller_->Stop();
850:         gif_controller_.reset();
851:     }
852: 
853:     if (emoji_image_ == nullptr)
854:     {
855:         return;
856:     }
857: 
858:     auto emoji_collection = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_)->emoji_collection();
859:     auto image = emoji_collection != nullptr ? emoji_collection->GetEmojiImage(emotion) : nullptr;
860:     if (image == nullptr)
861:     {
862:         const char *utf8 = font_awesome_get_utf8(emotion);
863:         if (utf8 != nullptr && emoji_label_ != nullptr)
864:         {
865:             DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
866:             lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, utf8);
867:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
868:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
869:         }
870:         return;
871:     }
872: 
873:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
874:     if (image->IsGif())
875:     {
876:         // Create new GIF controller
877:         gif_controller_ = std::make_unique<LvglGif>(image->image_dsc());
878: 
879:         if (gif_controller_->IsLoaded())
880:         {
881:             // Set up frame update callback
882:             gif_controller_->SetFrameCallback([this]()
883:                                               { lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc()); });
884: 
885:             // Set initial frame and start animation
886:             lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc());
887:             gif_controller_->Start();
888: 
889:             // Show GIF, hide others
890:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
891:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
892:         }
893:         else
894:         {
895:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to load GIF for emotion: %s", emotion);
896:             gif_controller_.reset();
897:         }
898:     }
899:     else
900:     {
901:         lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, image->image_dsc());
902:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
903:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
904:     }
905: 
906: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
907:     // In WeChat message style, if emotion is neutral, don't display it
908:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
909:     if (strcmp(emotion, "neutral") == 0 && child_count > 0)
910:     {
911:         // Stop GIF animation if running
912:         if (gif_controller_)
913:         {
914:             gif_controller_->Stop();
915:             gif_controller_.reset();
916:         }
917: 
918:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
919:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
920:     }
921: #endif
922: }
923: 
924: void LcdDisplay::SetTheme(Theme *theme)
925: {
926:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
927: 
928:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(theme);
929: 
930:     // Get the active screen
931:     lv_obj_t *screen = lv_screen_active();
932: 
933:     // Set font
934:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
935:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
936:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
937: 
938:     if (text_font->line_height >= 40)
939:     {
940:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
941:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
942:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
943:     }
944:     else
945:     {
946:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
947:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
948:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
949:     }
950: 
951:     // Set parent text color
952:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
953:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
954: 
955:     // Set background image
956:     if (lvgl_theme->background_image() != nullptr)
957:     {
958:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, lvgl_theme->background_image()->image_dsc(), 0);
959:     }
960:     else
961:     {
962:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, nullptr, 0);
963:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
964:     }
965: 
966:     // Update top bar background color with 50% opacity
967:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
968:     {
969:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
970:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
971:     }
972: 
973:     // Update status bar elements
974:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
975:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
976:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
977:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
978:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
979:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
980: 
981:     // If we have the chat message style, update all message bubbles
982: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
983:     // Set content background opacity
984:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(content_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
985: 
986:     // Iterate through all children of content (message containers or bubbles)
987:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
988:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < child_count; i++)
989:     {
990:         lv_obj_t *obj = lv_obj_get_child(content_, i);
991:         if (obj == nullptr)
992:             continue;
993: 
994:         lv_obj_t *bubble = nullptr;
995: 
996:         // Check if this object is a container or bubble
997:         // If it's a container (user or system message), get its child as bubble
998:         // If it's a bubble (assistant message), use it directly
999:         if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(obj) > 0)
1000:         {
1001:             // Might be a container, check if it's a user or system message container
1002:             // User and system message containers are transparent
1003:             lv_opa_t bg_opa = lv_obj_get_style_bg_opa(obj, 0);
1004:             if (bg_opa == LV_OPA_TRANSP)
1005:             {
1006:                 // This is a user or system message container
1007:                 bubble = lv_obj_get_child(obj, 0);
1008:             }
1009:             else
1010:             {
1011:                 // This might be an assistant message bubble itself
1012:                 bubble = obj;
1013:             }
1014:         }
1015:         else
1016:         {
1017:             // No child elements, might be other UI elements, skip
1018:             continue;
1019:         }
1020:

1030:             // Apply correct color based on bubble type

1050: 
1051:             // Update text color for the message

The `LcdDisplay::SetupUI` function initializes and configures the user interface layout for the LCD display using the LVGL graphics library. It sets up a full-screen container with a top bar for status icons (network, mute, battery) and applies styling based on the current theme, including fonts, colors, and spacing. This function establishes the visual structure and appearance of the device's main display interface.

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness:
The generated code attempts to implement a UI setup function that largely mirrors the intention of the ground truth but introduces structural changes that alter semantics. For example, it adds new components like `preview_image_`, `emoji_box_`, and `bottom_bar_` which are not part of the original design. These additions change the intended layout hierarchy and may affect how other parts of the system interact with this UI. However, core elements such as setting up fonts, colors, containers, top bar, status bar, labels, and popups are semantically aligned.

Structure Similarity:
While many API calls and styling patterns match the ground truth, there are notable differences in object creation order and parent-child relationships. The use of flex layouts is consistent, but alignment strategies differ slightly (e.g., more reliance on `lv_obj_align()`). Some stylistic choices like setting `LV_LAYOUT_NONE` and using absolute positioning appear in both versions, showing partial structural overlap. Differences include extra widgets and inconsistent naming or usage of certain objects (`content_` vs `bottom_bar_`).

Functional Completeness:
Several key components from the ground truth are missing or replaced in the generated version:
- Missing: `container_` used as a flex column container for layering; instead, layers are directly added to screen.
- Missing: Proper chat content area (`content_`) with scrollable message list — replaced by `bottom_bar_`.
- Added: New elements like `preview_image_`, `emoji_box_` which aren't present in the reference implementation.
- Partially implemented: Battery popup and label exist but might behave differently due to layout context.
Overall, critical functionality related to chat message handling and layered container architecture is incomplete compared to the ground truth.

results.query: complete the function SetChatMessage(const char *, const char *)()
results.description: The `LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage` function displays chat messages on the LCD screen, managing message history by removing old messages when necessary and handling special display rules for system messages. It creates styled message bubbles with appropriate sizing and positioning based on the message content and role (e.g., user, AI, system). The function also ensures that empty messages are not displayed and hides the AI logo when non-system messages are shown.

488:     lv_label_set_text(status_label_, Lang::Strings::INITIALIZING);
489:     lv_obj_align(status_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);

507:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0); // Space between messages

543: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
544: {
545:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
546:     if (content_ == nullptr)
547:     {
548:         return;
549:     }
550: 
551:     if (image == nullptr)
552:     {
553:         return;
554:     }
555: 
556:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
557:     // Create a message bubble for image preview
558:     lv_obj_t *img_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
559:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(img_bubble, 8, 0);
560:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(img_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
561:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(img_bubble, 0, 0);
562:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
563: 
564:     // Set image bubble background color (similar to system message)
565:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
566:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(img_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
567: 
568:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
569:     lv_obj_set_user_data(img_bubble, (void *)"image");
570: 
571:     // Create the image object inside the bubble
572:     lv_obj_t *preview_image = lv_image_create(img_bubble);
573: 
574:     // Calculate appropriate size for the image
575:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 70 / 100;  // 70% of screen width
576:     lv_coord_t max_height = LV_VER_RES * 50 / 100; // 50% of screen height
577: 
578:     // Calculate zoom factor to fit within maximum dimensions
579:     auto img_dsc = image->image_dsc();
580:     lv_coord_t img_width = img_dsc->header.w;
581:     lv_coord_t img_height = img_dsc->header.h;
582:     if (img_width == 0 || img_height == 0)
583:     {
584:         img_width = max_width;
585:         img_height = max_height;
586:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid image dimensions: %ld x %ld, using default dimensions: %ld x %ld", img_width, img_height, max_width, max_height);
587:     }
588: 
589:     lv_coord_t zoom_w = (max_width * 256) / img_width;
590:     lv_coord_t zoom_h = (max_height * 256) / img_height;
591:     lv_coord_t zoom = (zoom_w < zoom_h) ? zoom_w : zoom_h;
592: 
593:     // Ensure zoom doesn't exceed 256 (100%)
594:     if (zoom > 256)
595:         zoom = 256;
596: 
597:     // Set image properties
598:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image, img_dsc);
599:     lv_image_set_scale(preview_image, zoom);
600: 
601:     // Add event handler to clean up LvglImage when image is deleted
602:     // We need to transfer ownership of the unique_ptr to the event callback
603:     LvglImage *raw_image = image.release(); // Release ownership of smart pointer
604:     lv_obj_add_event_cb(preview_image, [](lv_event_t *e)
605:                         {
606:         LvglImage* img = (LvglImage*)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
607:         if (img != nullptr) {
608:             delete img; // Properly release memory by deleting LvglImage object
609:         } }, LV_EVENT_DELETE, (void *)raw_image);
610: 
611:     // Calculate actual scaled image dimensions
612:     lv_coord_t scaled_width = (img_width * zoom) / 256;
613:     lv_coord_t scaled_height = (img_height * zoom) / 256;
614: 
615:     // Set bubble size to be 16 pixels larger than the image (8 pixels on each side)
616:     lv_obj_set_width(img_bubble, scaled_width + 16);
617:     lv_obj_set_height(img_bubble, scaled_height + 16);
618: 
619:     // Don't grow in flex layout
620:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(img_bubble, 0, 0);
621: 
622:     // Center the image within the bubble
623:     lv_obj_center(preview_image);
624: 
625:     // Left align the image bubble like assistant messages
626:     lv_obj_align(img_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
627: 
628:     // Auto-scroll to the image bubble
629:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(img_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
630: }
631: #else

787: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
788: {
789:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
790:     if (preview_image_ == nullptr)
791:     {
792:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Preview image is not initialized");
793:         return;
794:     }
795: 
796:     if (image == nullptr)
797:     {
798:         esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
799:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
800:         lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
801:         preview_image_cached_.reset();
802:         if (gif_controller_)
803:         {
804:             gif_controller_->Start();
805:         }
806:         return;
807:     }
808: 
809:     preview_image_cached_ = std::move(image);
810:     auto img_dsc = preview_image_cached_->image_dsc();
811:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image_, img_dsc);
812:     if (img_dsc->header.w > 0 && img_dsc->header.h > 0)
813:     {
814:         // zoom factor 0.5
815:         lv_image_set_scale(preview_image_, 128 * width_ / img_dsc->header.w);
